T5218S01E01.description: Six armed men steal £26m worth of gold from the Brink's-Mat. DCI Brian Boyce investigates.

T5218S01E02.description: A chain is set up to for the stolen Brink's-Mat gold. The police investigation leads them to Kent and Kenneth Noye.

T5218S01E03.description: Surveillance is put on Noye and the police are led to Palmer and more of the gold chain suspects. Resulting raids end in tragedy in Noye's garden.

T5218S01E04.description: Palmer learns he is wanted by the police. Cooper and Parry's plan comes unstuck. Noye's trial comes to a dramatic conclusion.

T5218S01E05.description: Unwanted attention in Tenerife forces Palmer into desperate action.

T5218S01E06.description: The net tightens as Brightwell and Jennings make a shocking discovery.

T5218S02E01.description: The police chase the other half of the stolen Brinks-Mat gold when it resurfaces. In Tenerife, John Palmer's successful timeshare business starts to attract unwanted attention.

T5218S02E02.description: The proceeds from the stolen Brinks-Mat gold are laundered through growing international criminal networks. The police pick up the trail as their investigation spreads overseas.

T5218S02E03.description: As pressure builds on the criminals laundering the proceeds of the stolen Brinks-Mat gold, the police carry out surveillance on their targets and pursue suspects around the world.

T5218S02E04.description: The British police join forces with the DEA to take down the international money laundering operation. In Tenerife, John Palmer has an unwelcome visitor as the pressure builds.

T5218S02E05.description: Old and new Brinks-Mat criminals are in hiding around the world. As the police and criminal rivals close in on all fronts, the chase begins. Boyce meets an old foe.

T5218S02E06.description: Brian Boyce retires, but the work continues. In Britain and America, the Brinks-Mat criminals face their day in court. In Spain, a dangerous manhunt is launched.

S5290S01E01.description: An unexpected opportunity results in Mike Ross, who doesn't actually have a law degree, becoming the new associate at a Manhattan law firm.

S5290S01E02.description: An open and closed case becomes anything but when Harvey discovers that the judge in his case has a personal vendetta against him.

S5290S01E03.description: Harvey asks Mike to find a loophole so that he can oust the incoming CEO of a motor company he represents.

S5290S01E04.description: As Harvey defends someone from Jessica's past, Mike is assigned his first solo case (where his secret is almost discovered).

S5290S01E05.description: Harvey, a witness for his driver in a civil suit, has to rely on Louis for help. Mike bails his old friend Trevor out of jail.

S5290S01E06.description: Harvey and Mike try to prove that a woman accused of insider trading is innocent. Mike also tries to help Rachel study for the LSAT, but he soon finds her close to uncovering his secret.

S5290S01E07.description: It's mock trial time at Pearson Hardman as Mike faces off against Louis' protege, Kyle.

S5290S01E08.description: While Harvey and Louis come to blows after Louis' reckless behavior threatens to cost the firm a case.

S5290S01E09.description: Harvey meets his match in a cocky opposing counsel in a class action lawsuit, and Mike unknowingly helps frame Rachel as a traitor to the firm.

S5290S01E10.description: Harvey must fire an accountant for falsifying his credentials, but Mike finds a more sinister motive for his termination and becomes concerned about his own employment.

S5290S01E11.description: Harvey is threatened with disbarment if he doesn't testify against his old mentor in the DA's office. Meanwhile, Harvey wagers Mike's services in a bet with Louis.

S5290S01E12.description: Harvey's efforts to free an innocent man hit a wall when he goes against the new district attorney.

S5290S02E01.description: Harvey entrusts Mike with closing a major lawsuit while he must make a decision about guarding Mike's secret.

S5290S02E02.description: With Hardman back and knowing that it's a matter of time before he challenges Jessica for control, she decides to make sure she has enough support.

S5290S02E03.description: Hardman tries to ingratiate himself by asking Jessica to let him handle a case wherein they're trying to keep some nurses from going on strike.

S5290S02E04.description: With Harvey's career on the line in a lawsuit for fraud, he gives Mike to Louis.

S5290S02E05.description: Harvey balks when Jessica puts him in the passenger seat on a lawsuit that could make or break the firm.

S5290S02E06.description: Harvey deals with a gambling addict who just lost his company, Louis and Rachel look into a ballet company's problem, and Jessica encounters a judge desiring payback for a past prank.

S5290S02E07.description: As the fallout continues to reverberate from the pending lawsuit against Pearson Hardman, Harvey turns to a former colleague.

S5290S02E08.description: With the continuing upheaval at the firm, Mike and Harvey reflect on how their past decisions have influenced their present situation.

S5290S02E09.description: Harvey is tasked with closing the one person whose vote will decide Pearson Hardman's future.

S5290S02E10.description: Harvey needs Mike's help as the battle for control of Pearson Hardman reaches its climax.

S5290S02E11.description: Mike gets too emotional when Harvey allows him to negotiate a hit-and-run settlement, and Louis runs into trouble as he tries to hire his first associate.

S5290S02E12.description: Harvey must protect Pearson Hardman from a rival firm. Louis and Mike pay the price for previous actions.

S5290S02E13.description: Rachel's father becomes the defense attorney in a gender discrimination lawsuit being prosecuted by Pearson Hardman.

S5290S02E14.description: Daniel Hardman plays a dirty trick on his old firm when he takes over the defense in the gender discrimination case.

S5290S02E15.description: Harvey joins forces with an old familiar face to take down Daniel Hardman, Mike and Katrina play a sneaky game of one-upmanship.

S5290S02E16.description: Harvey's vision for the firm's future clashes with Jessica's when a British firm offers a tempting proposition.

S5290S03E01.description: Jessica's partnership with Darby is tested when he assigns Harvey a high-profile client who faces the loss of her company unless proven innocent.

S5290S03E02.description: Louis offers Mike a case that could change his future at the firm.

S5290S03E03.description: Cameron Dennis strikes back at Harvey by arresting one of his clients for murder. Meanwhile, Katrina Bennet and a British version of Harvey arrive to stir things up at the firm.

S5290S03E04.description: Harvey's defense of Ava hits a roadblock when the interests of her murder trial are at odds with Louis' work to thwart a hostile takeover of Hessington Oil by a rival businessman.

S5290S03E05.description: Amidst a lot of office wheelings and dealings, a bet between Harvey and Huntley moves Mike onto a new case, whereby he takes Rachel along as his own "Mike" to his "Harvey."

S5290S03E06.description: Cameron's continuing use of shady tactics on Ava's case brings up memories of why Harvey left the DA's office to work for Jessica. Mike looks back on what cost him his one chance at a Harvard degree.

S5290S03E07.description: Harvey clashes with Stephen over Ava's case. Meanwhile, things are still tense between Harvey and Jessica as they strategize how best to defend Ava. Louis enlists Rachel in his battle with Nigel over a broken contract...and heart.

S5290S03E08.description: As Ava Hessington's murder trial begins, Harvey, Mike and Jessica fight off betrayal from both inside the firm and out. Meanwhile, Louis and Donna seek to even the score with those who have done them wrong.

S5290S03E09.description: Trust issues are brought to the forefront as Harvey and Scottie battle again. Louis wants to handle the dissolution talks. Mike wants to move forward in his relationship with Rachel.

S5290S03E10.description: An old nemesis returns to complicate the Pearson Darby negotiations and put Harvey and Scottie on opposite sides once again. Meanwhile, Mike and Rachel find themselves under Jessica's scrutiny. Louis ends up in Sheila's crosshairs.

S5290S03E11.description: With Darby finally out, Harvey and Jessica look at bringing Scottie into the firm. Louis tries to figure out how Mike got into the firm without a Harvard file.

S5290S03E12.description: Both Mike and Jessica lean on Harvey for support when things from their respective pasts throw them off their game.

S5290S03E13.description: Harvey finally gets his chance to take on Elliott Stemple, a man who beat Harvey three times in moot court and has avoided him since. Meanwhile, Dana Scott picks a fight with Louis.

S5290S03E14.description: While Harvey and Mike have unpleasant work to do for one of their biggest clients, Louis faces a huge challenge and Rachel tries to collect on an old debt.

S5290S03E15.description: Harvey faces off with a relentless attorney who goes after one of his biggest clients.

S5290S03E16.description: Harvey and Mike find themselves at odds with a tenacious U.S. Attorney.

S5290S04E01.description: Mike, now working as an investment banker, comes to Harvey with a plan to buy out a corporation, but Harvey is soon stuck with a conflict of interest.

S5290S04E02.description: Mike and Harvey go into battle with each other when Harvey leaves Mike high and dry, with Rachel stuck in the middle.

S5290S04E03.description: Logan Sanders orders Harvey to play dirty in his battle with Mike, and Mike's reputation and relationship with Rachel are not off limits.

S5290S04E04.description: Mike moves to a hostile takeover of Gillis Industries while Harvey and Louis get serious about the fight.

S5290S04E05.description: Mike tries to bluff Harvey with his newfound money, but the move backfires, and the case takes a physical toll on Rachel.

S5290S04E06.description: Harvey tries to put an end to the Gillis Industries takeover, but when Mike continues to play hardball, Louis sees an opportunity to make a name for himself.

S5290S04E07.description: Mike is reeling from the takeover battle when Rachel shares some troubling news. In recognition of Louis' victory for the firm, Jessica allows him to name his own reward.

S5290S04E08.description: The firm is under attack when Sean Cahill stops at nothing to get the documents on the Gillis takeover. Rachel tries to repair things with Mike.

S5290S04E09.description: Louis comes clean to Harvey and Jessica. Pearson Specter faces an uncertain future as Cahill begins a round of depositions.

S5290S04E10.description: Harvey and Jessica take measures to protect the firm from an outsider attempting to poach their clients.

S5290S04E11.description: Jessica tries to appease Louis while he starts persecuting Mike hoping to get him to quit. Zane calls in a favor with Harvey.

S5290S04E12.description: As Harvey takes on Professor Gerard as a client in a bribery investigation and discovers that he may have committed an ethics violation.

S5290S04E13.description: Harvey and Louis take a drive to aid an out-of-town client to whom they both have deep ties.

S5290S04E14.description: When Mike takes on a humanitarian case that could potentially harm firm business, Harvey must consider how to deal with him.

S5290S04E15.description: When Evan Smith brings new evidence nullifying the firm's victory against Liberty Rail, Harvey and Mike must scramble to save the case.

S5290S04E16.description: Sean fails to link his corrupt boss to Charles Forstman, leading Harvey to revisit his uncomfortable past in order to out Eric and Charles away.

S5290S05E01.description: Donna tries to adjust to working for Louis, while Harvey tries to keep his focus amid changes.

S5290S05E02.description: Harvey searches for a replacement for Donna. Mike takes a case as a favor, while Robert Zane offers some unsolicited advice Mike and Rachel's engagement.

S5290S05E03.description: Mike brings in Robert Zane to co-counsel a case, pitting his instincts as a lawyer against his desire to stay in his future father-in-law's good graces.

S5290S05E04.description: Harvey steps outside his usual area of expertise in order to take a case for a client who has a special tie to the firm.

S5290S05E05.description: Harvey's rival claims to be a changed man, while his sessions with Dr. Agard continue.

S5290S05E06.description: Reeling from Dr. Agard's revelation, Harvey is forced to make a difficult and personal decision in a case.

S5290S05E07.description: Donna and Harvey try to get their friendship back to normal. Esther Litt returns to solve a problem discreetly, but Louis rarely handles anything quietly when it comes to family.

S5290S05E08.description: The firm ponders Harvey's punishment for his misdeed.

S5290S05E09.description: Rachel and her mother, Laura Zane, plan for Rachel's dream wedding, but Rachel fears the event may reveal Mike's secret.

S5290S05E10.description: Jessica and Louis make an effort to rally the support of the partners as Daniel Hardman and Jack Soloff attempt a takeover.

S5290S05E11.description: Jessica and Harvey must figure out how to build a defense for Mike, knowing full well that he's guilty of the crime for which he stands accused.

S5290S05E12.description: Mike and Louis look into an anonymous tipper in order to diffuse a damning piece of evidence. Meanwhile, Gibbs has set her sights on Jessica and Harvey.

S5290S05E13.description: Mike is furious when Anita Gibbs tries to scare Rachel into making a deal, while he turns to Dana to help save Harvey.

S5290S05E14.description: As time runs out before the trial, Mike wants to represent himself while Harvey wants to lead the charge and challenges Mike to a winner takes all showdown.

S5290S05E15.description: Mike works on another case as he awaits word on his own fate, while Louis and Harvey each consider taking drastic action before the verdict comes in.

S5290S05E16.description: As Mike's immediate future begins to come into focus, he's forced to deal with the personal and professional consequences of the decisions he's made.

S5290S06E01.description: On his first night in prison, Mike creates a big problem for himself and Harvey.

S5290S06E02.description: Louis, Jessica and Harvey fend off a class action lawsuit from PSL's former clients. Meanwhile, Mike runs afoul of a fellow prisoner due to reasons beyond his own control.

S5290S06E03.description: Mike tries to stay safe without breaking Danbury's unwritten rules. Jessica and Harvey try to land a whale.

S5290S06E04.description: Harvey and Sean Cahill launch a plan to get Mike to take a deal, but Harvey calls an audible at the last minute.

S5290S06E05.description: The plan to get Mike out early becomes more complicated when Harvey and Sean Cahill become opposing counsel.

S5290S06E06.description: Jessica makes a play for Sutter's business that could jeopardize Mike's deal, and Kevin's confession creates a rift between him and Mike.

S5290S06E07.description: Harvey, Louis and Donna search for a missing link to Sutter's inside trading. Mike takes a drastic step to get Kevin on his side.

S5290S06E08.description: Harvey counters Cahill's star witness while Mike tries to deliver a witness himself. Jessica and Rachel try to delay Leonard's execution.

S5290S06E09.description: In order to protect Mike, Harvey considers putting Gallo back on the streets. Jessica and Rachel get Bailey's case reopened, but winning it is no slam dunk.

S5290S06E10.description: Jessica and Rachel fight to save Leonard Bailey's life.

S5290S06E11.description: Jessica has left Pearson Specter Litt and now Harvey and Louis have to figure out how things will proceed with the firm's future lying exclusively in their hands only.

S5290S06E12.description: Harvey tries to repair a broken relationship - leaving Louis, Donna and Rachel to manage PSL in his absence.

S5290S06E13.description: Rachel receives a letter that creates an unexpected issue for Harvey and Louis. Mike's mentorship of Oliver and Marissa gets put to the test.

S5290S06E14.description: Harvey and Mike team up to take on Velocity for Mike's admission in the bar. Meanwhile, Louis tries to retain a huge client on his own.

S5290S06E15.description: When Mike's class action hits a snag, it might cost him more than the case. Harvey, Louis and Rachel consider getting their hands dirty.

S5290S06E16.description: Mike needs Harvey and Rachel's help to defeat an impossible obstacle, or his dream of becoming a real lawyer is over.

S5290S07E01.description: Mike returns to Pearson Specter Litt while Harvey takes the reins.

S5290S07E02.description: Harvey butts heads with his partners over a bold move; Mike pursues a pro bono case with the legal clinic.

S5290S07E03.description: Louis and Harvey wrangle with new firm dynamics. Mike's latest success brings him unexpected new business.

S5290S07E04.description: Harvey, Louis and Donna must get on the same page - and fast - when Bratton Gould comes after PSL for poaching an attorney.

S5290S07E05.description: Mike juggles his work obligations with his promise to help a hurting family. Harvey asks for Louis's discretion in handling a sensitive matter.

S5290S07E06.description: Mike deals with the blow back on his prison case; Harvey tries to tell Donna about his relationship with Paula.

S5290S07E07.description: Harvey learns the scope of Alex's involvement in the prison case, while Mike races to keep it alive. Lipschitz forces Louis out of his comfort zone.

S5290S07E08.description: Harvey and Mike seek outside help to overcome an impossible situation. An unexpected encounter derails Louis's search for a new associate.

S5290S07E09.description: Mike proposes a power move to boost business, but Harvey's past complicates matters. Rachel is surprised when her dad offers a chance to join forces.

S5290S07E10.description: Mike and Harvey's power move is countered, putting their backs up against the ropes. Rachel fears her father's judgment is clouded by the past.

S5290S07E11.description: Harvey and Louis fight to protect the future of the firm from its past; Alex worries Mike's instincts could risk a client relationship.

S5290S07E12.description: Harvey has to call in an old debt for the firm. Mike goes toe-to-toe with an unlikely opponent. Louis comes to terms with his new role.

S5290S07E13.description: Harvey is forced into a difficult decision when the impossible is asked of him. Mike and Rachel try to make some time to discuss their future.

S5290S07E14.description: Harvey and Mike team up to defend a judge accused of impropriety while Donna fights for the firms' offices.

S5290S07E15.description: Mike handles a class action with the clinic while Jessica asks Harvey for help. The firm fights a former partner who wants to take over the firm.

S5290S07E16.description: Mike and Rachel decide to give their personal life priority over the firm.

S5290S08E01.description: Harvey and Zane grapple over who should lead as the firm works through its transition.

S5290S08E02.description: Harvey and Donna get their first taste of how Samantha operates; Alex tries to impress Zane.

S5290S08E03.description: Harvey is drawn into a dispute with the firm's landlord. Alex pursues Samantha's former client.

S5290S08E04.description: Alex is caught between Harvey and Zane as Louis struggles to overcome a shocking setback.

S5290S08E05.description: Harvey confronts his personal issues to defend his brother. Louis sacrifices for family.

S5290S08E06.description: Harvey and Louis assess their relationship. Donna doubts Samantha's motives for helping her.

S5290S08E07.description: Donna's agreement forces Harvey to help David Fox. Alex comes to Zane's aid on a personal venture.

S5290S08E08.description: Harvey helps Samantha settle an old score. Louis faces a hurdle on the path to fatherhood.

S5290S08E09.description: An old foe backs the firm into a corner. Samantha and Alex try to broker a peace between clients.

S5290S08E10.description: When Harvey and Zane can't stay on the sidelines, Donna does what's best for the firm.

S5290S08E11.description: Harvey laces up for a rematch against an old foe. Louis struggles to hold the reins of the firm.

S5290S08E12.description: Louis learns the finer points of managing Harvey. Alex is caught between Samantha and his wife.

S5290S08E13.description: Harvey and Donna are caught in the crosshairs when Stu is blackmailed. Samantha revisits her past.

S5290S08E14.description: Harvey's forced to choose a side when Samantha and Scottie go toe-to-toe. Louis represents Lipschitz.

S5290S08E15.description: Donna's relationship complicates a deal for Harvey and Alex. Samantha helps Louis get justice.

S5290S08E16.description: When Hardman comes looking for retribution, the firm rallies to Harvey's defense.

S5290S09E01.description: Harvey and Samantha fight to keep Zane's name on the wall. Alex warns Louis of the consequences.

S5290S09E02.description: The firm faces the repercussions of its actions. Samantha enlists Katrina to help an old friend.

S5290S09E03.description: Harvey takes a case to send Faye a message. Louis finds a new opportunity.

S5290S09E04.description: Faye decides to take action against Harvey and Donna's relationship. Harvey looks to impress Donna's father.

S5290S09E05.description: Samantha gets caught in the middle when Mike picks a fight with Harvey. Katrina wrestles with lingering feelings for Brian.

S5290S09E06.description: Harvey makes a play to get Samantha's job back. Katrina faces off against an old friend.

S5290S09E07.description: Harvey and Samantha go on a road trip. Louis gets in over his head with a potential client.

S5290S09E08.description: An old foe forces Harvey to account for past actions. Esther has a problem only Louis can solve.

S5290S09E09.description: Mike helps Harvey get over a personal loss. An attempt to take down Faye becomes complicated.

S5290S09E10.description: As the firm faces potential destruction, the partners must go all-in to save it.

W5270S01E01.description: When a deliciously wicked prank gets Wednesday expelled, her parents ship her off to Nevermore Academy, the boarding school where they fell in love.

W5270S01E02.description: The sheriff questions Wednesday about the night's strange happenings. Later, Wednesday faces off against a fierce rival in the cutthroat Poe Cup race.

W5270S01E03.description: Wednesday stumbles on a secret society. During Outreach Day, Nevermore's outcasts mingle with Jericho's normies in Pilgrim World. Fudge, anyone?

W5270S01E04.description: Wednesday asks Xavier to the Rave'N dance, sparking Tyler's jealousy - but Thing's got something up his sleeve. Meanwhile, Eugene stakes out the cave.

W5270S01E05.description: During Parents Weekend, Wednesday digs into her family's past - and accidentally gets her dad arrested. Enid feels the pressure to "wolf out."

W5270S01E06.description: Wednesday's friends throw her a surprise birthday party. They mean well - but she'd much rather mark the miserable occasion by solving the murders.

W5270S01E07.description: Kooky Uncle Fester pays a visit and shares his theory about the monster. Wednesday begrudgingly agrees to a date with Tyler at Crackstone's crypt.

W5270S01E08.description: Wednesday lands in trouble with Principal Weems, but that's just the start of her problems. To fight an ancient evil, she'll need all her friends' help.

W5270S02E01.description: After a productive summer break, Wednesday returns to Nevermore as a grudging campus celebrity--and the target of a dangerous stalker.

W5270S02E02.description: Chaos reigns on campus as Nevermore celebrates its annual Prank Day; Wednesday confronts an old enemy and gains an unwanted ally.

W5270S02E03.description: Stripped of both her ability and Goody's book, Wednesday is forced to do some old-fashioned detective work on a school camping trip.

W5270S02E04.description: Fester and Thing commit themselves to Wednesday's case; trying to conceal one secret, Bianca stumbles on another.

W5270S02E05.description: With Tyler on the loose, Wednesday readies for a risky Dia de los Muertos showdown. Slurp's growing hunger poses problems for Pugsley.

W5270S02E06.description: An encounter with a spirit from Nevermore's past gives Wednesday and Enid a new perspective on one another -- and puts one of their classmates in danger.

W5270S02E07.description: As the school gala looms, Wednesday digs up dirt on Dort, Enid tries not to wolf out and Morticia engages in a battle of wills with Grandmama.

W5270S02E08.description: When buried family secrets are unearthed, Wednesday must race against time to prevent a dark prophecy from being realized.

Z6527S01E01.description: Former President George Mullen's comfortable retirement is upended after he's asked to lead an investigation into a horrific cyberattack.

Z6527S01E02.description: Mullen's commission investigates a hacking ring. President Mitchell weighs retaliation. A powerful figure has demands for Roger.

Z6527S01E03.description: Mullen's initial arrests draw blowback from the public - especially TV pundit Evan Green. Alex faces pressure to investigate her father.

Z6527S01E04.description: A shock to the financial system increases scrutiny on Mullen's commission. Valerie investigates Proteus. Roger must make a difficult choice.

Z6527S01E05.description: A personal tragedy reopens old wounds for the Mullen family. Speaker Dreyer pushes for a change in leadership. Sheila testifies before Congress.

Z6527S01E06.description: A new threat creates further unrest across the nation. As he narrows in on the culprit, Mullen is faced with an agonizing decision.

P6204S01E01.description: As a hurricane bears down on Miami, things are equally stormy in the Maguire ER, where a serious allegation has opened rifts between the residents.

P6204S01E02.description: As the storm intensifies, Danny faces difficult decisions in the packed ER. Tom steps up when a loved one gets hurt.

P6204S01E03.description: As backup power dwindles, Dr. Cruz fears for Vero's safety while Sophie and Camila take dangerous steps to rescue a patient.

P6204S01E04.description: After a storm fills the ER, Danny juggles numerous patients while dealing with a new attending physician who shares a past connection with Xander.

P6204S01E05.description: A deputy sheriff charms his way toward Danny. Parents of a young patient pressure Harper. Sophie wrestles with a moral choice.

P6204S01E06.description: A visit home to their challenging father stirs up tensions between Danny and Harper. Tom and Dr. Soriano's free day doesn't go as planned.

P6204S01E07.description: Danny and Sam face evaluation by Dr. Cruz for chief resident selection. Meanwhile, Camila investigates a patient's unexplained symptoms.

P6204S01E08.description: While waiting to meet HR, Danny and Xander confront their difficult history. Tom faces a loyalty test during a crisis.

P6204S01E09.description: A nightclub blaze sends many victims to the emergency room. Dr. Cruz faces a tough choice that could affect Danny's future.

P6204S01E10.description: Xander reveals the truth about his previous hospital while a new chief resident arrives, bringing fresh challenges to the emergency room.

O8420S01E01.description: In the wake of tragedy, training officer Traci Harmon takes on new trainee, Alex Diaz who on day one is already learning the job is harder than he imagined.

O8420S01E02.description: A chaotic street takeover finds the officers grossly outnumbered, revealing philosophical rifts inside West Division.

O8420S01E03.description: Diaz learns that Harmon has enemies within West Division, and begins to fear she cannot be trusted.

O8420S01E04.description: Desperate for a lead, Harmon goes off book resulting in a major breakthrough and a deadly showdown

O8420S01E05.description: Back on patrol, the rift between Harmon and Diaz comes to a head.

O8420S01E06.description: When Diaz's family is threatened, Harmon realises she must break her own rules to fix it.

O8420S01E07.description: A shot caller's revenge mission results in West Division going head to head with an entire gang.

O8420S01E08.description: Harmon and Diaz join forces with an elite squad to intercept a major drug shipment.

T6240S01E01.description: Dwight, blindsided by the news that his mob family has nothing left for him in New York, is sent to Tulsa, Oklahoma; as he settles in and surveys his new surroundings, Dwight wastes no time making new associates.

T6240S01E02.description: Dwight, Tyson, and Bodhi go on a road trip to take care of some business; Stacy does some digging into Dwight's past.

T6240S01E03.description: Dwight takes note of a possible new business opportunity. Later, a routine errand has an explosive, unexpected outcome. Stacy opens up to Dwight about what led her to Tulsa.

T6240S01E04.description: As Dwight gets his nitrous oxide business going, he tracks down the assassin who tried to kill him, and forms a crew from unlikely candidates.

T6240S01E05.description: While Dwight is in New York for his brother's funeral, he learns some unsettling news from both Tulsa and the home front.

T6240S01E06.description: Dwight visits Tina before returning to Tulsa. Pete agrees to send Goodie to Oklahoma, while Roxy tries to keep the FBI at bay. Dwight has an offer for Mitch.

T6240S01E07.description: Stacy makes a decision that has serious consequences. Dwight and Armand dispose of evidence, and Bodhi proposes a new plan. Tina contemplates her future.

T6240S01E08.description: Dwight and Bodhi lay out the casino plan for Jimmy. As pressure increases, Dwight, Mitch, and Tyson assemble their team. Stacy confronts Waltrip.

T6240S02E01.description: As Dwight and his crew prepare for the opening of their casino and new weed shop, the law comes knocking.

T6240S02E02.description: A family member from Dwight's past surprises him in Tulsa, meanwhile his newfound success draws attention from the Kansas City Mob.

T6240S02E03.description: Dwight has a contentious meeting with Bill Bevilaqua and later finds out his fate in court.

T6240S02E04.description: Dwight and Bodhi explore a new investment opportunity; Thresher learns how far he can push certain people.

T6240S02E05.description: Thresher makes a move on Dwight's crew as tensions rise within the New York City Mob family.

T6240S02E06.description: Dwight has a sit-down with Kansas City and New York; Tyson tries to make his family proud but it comes at a price.

T6240S02E07.description: Dwight and crew try to identify who's responsible for the recent attack.

T6240S02E08.description: Bevilaqua prepares for revenge. Thresher and Ming discuss a new arrangement.

T6240S02E09.description: With Armand stealing Dwight's money, Manfredi's crew seeks revenge on Bevilacqua's men. Thresher's own problems mount as he tries to evade consequences. The question is: what will Chickie do next?

T6240S02E10.description: Dwight and his crew tie up loose ends as his empire expands.

V5210S01E01.description: Ragnar goes on a trip of initiation with his son. Meanwhile, he thinks he has finally found a way to sail ships to the west. However, his beliefs are seen as insane so he chooses to go against the law.

V5210S01E02.description: The stage is set for the first journey west by Ragnar Lothbrok as he gathers a crew willing to risk their lives to travel into the unknown.

V5210S01E03.description: After his successful raid, Ragnar and his crew joyously return home with their riches. Earl Haraldson doesn't hesitate to summon Ragnar to the great hall where he lays claim to the entirety of the treasure. He allows the crew to take one thing from the hoard and Ragnar selects Brother Athelstan as his slave.

V5210S01E04.description: The Vikings head back to England to see what other treasures this new world has to offer. This go round Ragnar and his crew sail out with Earl Haraldson's permission.

V5210S01E05.description: In the Great Hall of Kattegat, a seer reads Earl Haraldson's future and tells him that Ragnar Lothbrok searches for his death.

V5210S01E06.description: Ragnar, weak and still hurt, must meet the Earl head-on after it comes to light that Rollo has been tortured on Haraldson's orders.

V5210S01E07.description: Three Viking ships sail upriver towards the very heart of power in eastern England: the Royal Villa of King Aelle.

V5210S01E08.description: The traditional pilgrimage to Uppsala to thank the gods brings a torrent of emotions for Ragnar, Lagertha, and Athelstan.

V5210S01E09.description: At the behest of King Horik, Ragnar assembles a small party to travel to Gotaland (modern day Sweden) to resolve a land dispute with the area's leader, Jarl Borg.

V5210S02E01.description: The battle begins between Ragnar and King Horik's forces against Jarl Borg. Borg is joined by Rollo, and this Viking clash pits brother against brother.

V5210S02E02.description: Four peaceful years have since passed with Ragnar as Earl. The time has come for an unlikely alliance to band together in pursuit of a common goal - a new raid on England. A storm pushes the Viking fleet to a new destination, and on the beaches of Wessex, Ragnar and his men may have met their match.

V5210S02E03.description: The Wessex Viking raid is in full swing and King Ecbert finds himself facing an entirely new kind of foe. While Ragnar races to dominate in the West, Jarl Borg has his own plans in store for the future of Kattegat.

V5210S02E04.description: A meeting between two great men may pave the way for future compromise as Ragnar and Ecbert come face to face. Jarl Borg now rules Kattegat and with an iron fist and Rollo must now become the leader his people need in Ragnar's absence.

V5210S02E05.description: Lagertha and Ragnar unite once again; Aslaug must face the truth of her prophecies; Athelstan struggles to define his faith; Bjorn must once again make a choice.

V5210S02E06.description: King Horik returns to Kattegat with a surprising proposition for Ragnar; Lagertha runs into a less than enthusiastic homecoming from her new husband; Athelstan becomes confidant to King Ecbert.

V5210S02E07.description: Ragnar and King Horik clash over differences; King Aelle arrives in Wessex; Ecbert has an eye on a new alliance.

V5210S02E08.description: Princess Aslaug's latest prophecy comes to fruition; Ragnar and Horik have very different ideas about the true purpose of their trip to Wessex.

V5210S02E09.description: Ragnar's warriors march on to King Ecbert's villa and are met with a vicious surprise.

V5210S02E10.description: Ragnar returns to Kattegat after the defeat in Wessex and places his trust in those who have stayed by his side all this time.

V5210S03E01.description: Ragnar and Lagertha's fleets depart Kattegat once more for Wessex but this time they bring settlers.

V5210S03E02.description: Lagertha and Athelstan help to set up the Viking settlement; a mysterious wanderer turns up.

V5210S03E03.description: King Ecbert visits the developing Viking settlement as the first harvest is sown.

V5210S03E04.description: There is bitterness in the camp, Floki is angry over the alliance with Ecbert.

V5210S03E05.description: The fleet returns to Kattegat to discover tragic circumstances await.

V5210S03E06.description: Preparations for the Paris raid pick up speed, and Rollo thinks about the Seer's prophecy.

V5210S03E07.description: The Viking fleet causes panic in Paris; the Emperor Charles declares he will remain in the city.

V5210S03E08.description: The Viking army sets out and Paris goes into lockdown as the army prepares the defense.

V5210S03E09.description: The Vikings hit Paris with a second assault; Emperor Charles has to make a difficult decision.

V5210S03E10.description: With one last chance to take Paris, Ragnar and his Viking troops take a daring chance. Ragnar asks Bjorn for a favor that could change the course of Viking history.

V5210S04E01.description: As Ragnar lies in his sick bed in Kattegat, events unfold beyond his control.

V5210S04E02.description: Ragnar and Floki are still at odds; Rollo makes great attempts to win over his new bride, Princess Gisla; Bjorn's survival skills are put to the test; King Ecbert sets the task for his son Aethelwulf to rescue Queen Kwenthrith.

V5210S04E03.description: Ragnar tells Floki he has to pay a heavy price for his actions. Rollo finds an ally in Count Odo. Bjorn Ironside finds more than he bargained for in the wilderness.

V5210S04E04.description: Ragnar gets to know the new slave woman while Rollo reveals his ambitions to his wife. Bjorn meets an unexpected warrior on his way home.

V5210S04E05.description: Halfdan the Black arrives in Kattegat. Floki reveals a secret to Finehair. Ragnar and Yidu become closer. Meanwhile Lagertha settles a score.

V5210S04E06.description: Ragnar reveals his plan to raid Paris again, and although the fleet is storm-tossed as it sets out, the challenge lies in Frankia where Rollo awaits. Meanwhile, Ecbert dispatches Aethelwulf and Alfred on a pilgrimage to Rome.

V5210S04E07.description: Now aware that Rollo has betrayed him, Ragnar carries out his plan of attack, which has dire consequences. Ecbert is given an offer from Prince Wigstan of Mercia. Harbard causes a stir with the women of Kattegat.

V5210S04E08.description: After facing defeat on the river, Ragnar refuses to retreat, prompting him to change his methods of attacking Paris. Count Odo's plot against Charles and Rollo backfires. Ecbert now rules Mercia, which dissatisfies Kwenthrith.

V5210S04E09.description: The Vikings finally reach the river. Aethelwulf and Alfred reach Rome. Erlendur makes his move against Bjorn. Sigurd makes a shocking discovery in Kattegat. Ecbert is crowned king in Mercia.

V5210S04E10.description: A ferocious battle between the Vikings and the Franks eventually comes down to Ragnar against Rollo. The outcome will seal the fate of the two brothers.

V5210S04E11.description: Ragnar has returned to Kattegat where he devises a plan to return to Wessex to right past wrongs.

V5210S04E12.description: Ragnar seeks to equip his voyage to Wessex, even while being warned that the gods have deserted him. Bjorn prepares to fulfill his dream of exploring the Mediterranean.

V5210S04E13.description: Ragnar and Ivar face a difficult decision in regards to their crew; Bjorn has an unexpected reunion.

V5210S04E14.description: Lagertha attempts to fulfill a long-held ambition; Ragnar negotiates an unexpected concession from King Ecbert.

V5210S04E15.description: King Aelle can't hide his pleasure when Ragnar arrives in a cage and shows him no mercy.

V5210S04E16.description: Bjorn's fleet sails onward and launches a surprise attack. Back in Kattegat, Lagertha continues in her quest for power.

V5210S04E17.description: The Great Army is gathering in Kattegat, as Lagertha is saved by Bjorn Ironside from the hands of Ragnar's sons. Rollo is establishing the kingdom of Normandie as a safe-heaven for all vikings in search for land.

V5210S04E18.description: Ragnar's plan comes to fruition; the Viking army lands on the coast of Northumbria.

V5210S04E19.description: The Viking army causes panic in the English countryside as King Ecbert and Aethelwulf plan the defense of the Kingdom of Wessex.

V5210S04E20.description: Prince Aethelwulf finds himself subject to the Vikings' battle master plan; Ecbert remains behind with a plan of his own.

V5210S05E01.description: Guided by Bishop Heahmund's visions, the Saxons devise a battle plan. Ivar the Boneless strategizes on his own as the Vikings undergo increasing pressure. Bjorn Ironside finds himself in a new territory and must convince the local commander he is a trader and not a raider.

V5210S05E02.description: As the Vikings establish their stronghold in York, Ivar is determined to lead the Great Army. In Kattegat, Lagertha misjudges King Harald and pays a heavy price. Floki arrives at a mysterious land.

V5210S05E03.description: Celebrations are cut short in the aftermath of the battle at York; Ragnar Lothbrok's sons are pitted against each other as tensions reach an all-time high, and each one is forced to choose a side.

V5210S05E04.description: Guided by Bishop Heahmund's visions, the Saxons devise a battle plan. Ivar the Boneless strategizes on his own as the Vikings undergo increasing pressure. Bjorn Ironside finds himself in a new territory and must convince the local commander he is a trader and not a raider.

V5210S05E05.description: Ivar meets his match in Bishop Heahmund. Floki returns to Kattegat. Bjorn receives a lavish welcome in North Africa.

V5210S05E06.description: Lagertha is betrayed, and Bjorn must find a way to support the distraught queen; Floki and his settlers arrive in a new land, but it is far from what they expected.

V5210S05E07.description: Bjorn returns to Kattegat to learn that an attack will take place during the next full moon; Ivar must decide if he can place his trust in a former enemy on the battlefield.

V5210S05E08.description: The battle for Kattegat begins. As the two armies line up to fight, the Great Heathen Army must decide between a final plea for peace or all-out war. Floki faces discord amongst the settlers.

V5210S05E09.description: The army leaders consider their options in the aftermath of the battle. In Floki's camp, all hopes of binding the community together are dashed as tragedy unfolds.

V5210S05E10.description: A sense of doom looms over Kattegat as bloodshed ensues, but as the defeated army flees in the face of the victors, a legendary warrior makes his way home.

V5210S05E11.description: Ivar is crowned the new king of Kattegat just in time to welcome Rollo home; Bjorn, Lagertha and Ubbe must rely on unsteady alliances to survive.

V5210S05E12.description: Bjorn, Lagertha and Ubbe face an uncertain fate as Heahmund's loyalty is tested; Floki fights to understand the will of the gods in Iceland; Ivar may have met his match in Kattegat.

V5210S05E13.description: Heahmund must convince King Alfred that his actions are in defense of the crown; Ubbe and Torvi strengthen the position of the Vikings, but not all in the Viking camp support their strategy; another settler disappears in Iceland.

V5210S05E14.description: King Harald and his army approaches Wessex while Aethelred is about to make a huge decision about his brother's fate.

V5210S05E15.description: Bishop Heahmund is wracked with guilt as he fights to renounce his passions. Viking will clash with Saxon on the battlefield leaving a key figure lost in the balance.

V5210S05E16.description: Ubbe achieves one of Ragnar's dreams; Ivar hatches a new plan in Kattegat, while preparing for a divine arrival; a settler in Iceland returns in a terrible state; King Alfred faces his greatest threat yet.

V5210S05E17.description: An unexpected turn among the settlers leaves Floki powerless. King Alfred confronts Judith. Bjorn must strike a deal with Harald. Wessex is once again threatened by a Viking force, but who will lead the Saxon army to defend the Realm?

V5210S05E18.description: Hvitserk is severely tested. Floki makes an amazing discovery. Freydis gives Ivar a surprise. Ubbe negotiates with the three Danish Kings that have massed their armies in Reading, but the negotiations may have a perilous outcome.

V5210S05E19.description: Ubbe is forced into hand-to-hand combat. Floki reaches new depths and is met by a shocking sight. Bjorn sets off for Scandinavia with an old rival.

V5210S05E20.description: A new battle for Kattegat is on, and only the gods know who will emerge victorious.

V5210S06E01.description: Bjorn struggles with the responsibilities of kingship and finds he can't rely on his mother, Lagertha; she has other plans. Ivar falls into the hands of Kievan Rus, and in their ruthless and unpredictable ruler, Prince Oleg, he may finally have met his match.

V5210S06E02.description: Messengers arrive in Kattegat with news that presents Bjorn with a dilemma. As Bjorn attempts to do the right thing as ruler of Kattegat, Prince Oleg of Kiev seems untroubled by his conscience.

V5210S06E03.description: Lagertha is forced to take action; In Kiev, although Oleg continues to be friendly, Ivar is aware of the threat which Oleg poses to the vulnerable young heir to the throne; Bjorn has answered the call and come to the aid of an old enemy.

V5210S06E04.description: Lagertha leads her village's response to the recent attacks, but despite her best efforts when the inevitable attack comes, the consequences are tragic. Olaf has a bold new plan for the future of Norway. In Kiev, although Ivar discusses Oleg's ambitions for Scandinavia, he's actually more interested in the plight of Igor, the young heir whom Oleg controls.

V5210S06E05.description: Norway's Kings and Jarls arrive at Harald's territory for the election of the King of all Norway, while King Olaf is confident of the result, the election may not run as smoothly as he thinks.

V5210S06E06.description: Bjorn is forced to act quickly in the aftermath of the election for the King of all Norway. The bandits attack Lagertha's village again, confident of victory, but when the defense boils down to single combat with Lagertha, victory for the bandits looks less certain. Back in Kattegat, haunted and paranoid, Hvitserk continues to unravel.

V5210S06E07.description: Bjorn returns to Kattegat; Harald gains a measure of revenge on Olaf; in Kiev, interesting news reaches Ivar and Igor about Prince Dir.

V5210S06E08.description: Bjorn faces a difficult decision. Ubbe and Torvi leave Kattegat, in search of new lands and perhaps old friends. Oleg's plans for the invasion of Scandinavia are taking shape, and King Harald is baffled by the origin of a mysterious raiding party.

V5210S06E09.description: Ubbe and Torvi are able to meet their unknown wanderer while in Iceland; Bjorn reconsiders who his enemies truly are after Erik's scouting mission,which prompts him to convince an old nemesis to join him; Ivar reunites with a close figure.

V5210S06E10.description: While Ivar and Igor continue to plot against Oleg, Kings Harald and Bjorn make frantic preparations to defend against the invasion,but the efforts of their quick work remain to be seen.

V5210S06E11.description: In Iceland, Ubbe learns the truth about Kjetill and has a difficult decision to make. Back in Norway, the battle against the Rus has had grave consequences. But reinforcements have arrived, and Bjorn has an idea that may yet save the day.

V5210S06E12.description: Ivar, Hvitserk, Prince Oleg and Prince Igor return to Kiev but the latter faces the consequences. With the leadership vacancy in Kattegat Erik, Gunnhild and Ingrid are making plans to fill it. Back to Kiev, Ivar and Prince Dir have new plans for Prince Oleg.

V5210S06E13.description: Trouble at sea heightens divisions near Iceland. A homecoming king with a new friend ends the spousal division threatened by an election in Kattegat. Good Friday is an opportunity for division among the Rus.

V5210S06E14.description: Prince Igor receives a hero's welcome in Novgorod but back in Kiev the mood is darker: prince Oleg will not be giving up the fight. Ubbe and the settlers find land but not the golden land.

V5210S06E15.description: Fighting in Greenland means a change of destination and new dangers for Ubbe and company. A death in Kiev brings changes. Gunnhild makes her choice. Ivar gets a surprise and makes a decision.

V5210S06E16.description: Out in the open sea, Ubbe and the settlers are at the mercy of the elements. Meanwhile Ivar and Hvitserk return to Kattegat.

V5210S06E17.description: When king Alfred hears about the arrival of the sons of Ragnar, with an army he must take drastic action. So as the Vikings army makes camp & lies in wait, Alfred and his army abandon the royal villa and march to meet them.

V5210S06E18.description: Ubbe and settlers find land but soon realize they are not alone. In Wessex, king Alfred has mustered up a large force to fight the Vikings. Meanwhile in Kattegat, Erik realizes that Ingrid had been using her powers on him.

V5210S06E19.description: In the new land, Ubbe and the settlers engage in careful diplomacy when they are surrounded by the locals. In Wessex the Vikings ambush the Saxon army, but Alfred is convinced the lord is with his army and refuses to retreat.

V5210S06E20.description: The epic saga which began with Ragnar Lothbrok, the first Vikings leader to emerge from the mists of legend, comes to an end in a spectacular and shocking series finale which finds striking the new land and in England.

B6521S01E01.description: Prime Minister Michael Callow faces a shocking dilemma when Princess Susannah, a much-loved member of the Royal Family, is kidnapped.

B6521S01E02.description: In a world where people's lives consist of riding exercise bikes to gain credits, Bing tries to help a woman get on to a singing competition show.

B6521S01E03.description: In the near future, everyone has access to a memory implant that records everything they do, see and hear. You need never forget a face again - but is that always a good thing?

B6521S02E01.description: After learning about a new service that lets people stay in touch with the deceased, a lonely, grieving Martha reconnects with her late lover.

B6521S02E02.description: Victoria wakes up and cannot remember anything about her life. Everyone she encounters refuses to communicate with her, and they all seem to know something she doesn't. But what?

B6521S02E03.description: A failed comedian who voices a popular cartoon bear named Waldo finds himself mixing in politics when TV executives want Waldo to run for office.

B6521S02E04.description: Three interconnected tales of technology run amok during the Christmas season are told by two men at a remote outpost in a frozen wilderness.

B6521S03E01.description: A woman desperate to boost her social media score hits the jackpot when she's invited to a swanky wedding, but the trip doesn't go as planned.

B6521S03E02.description: An American traveler short on cash signs up to test a revolutionary new gaming system, but soon can't tell where the hot game ends and reality begins.

B6521S03E03.description: When withdrawn Kenny stumbles headlong into an online trap, he is quickly forced into an uneasy alliance with shifty Hector, both at the mercy of persons unknown.

B6521S03E04.description: When Yorkie and Kelly visit San Junipero, a fun-loving beach town full of surf, sun and sex, their lives are changed totally.

B6521S03E05.description: Future soldiers Stripe and Raiman must protect frightened villagers from an infestation of vicious feral mutants.

B6521S03E06.description: In near-future London, police detective Karin Parke and her tech-savvy sidekick Blue investigate a string of mysterious deaths with a sinister link to social media.

B6521S04E01.description: Capt. Robert Daly presides over his crew with wisdom and courage. But a new recruit will soon discover nothing on this spaceship is what it seems.

B6521S04E02.description: After nearly losing her daughter, a mother invests in a new technology that allows her to keep track of her.

B6521S04E03.description: An insurance agent investigates a minor traffic incident using a device that manifests peoples' memories, but one of her witnesses has something to hide.

B6521S04E04.description: Paired up by a dating program that puts an expiration date on all relationships, Frank and Amy soon begin to question the system's logic.

B6521S04E05.description: In the post-apocalyptic landscape of the Scottish Moors, a woman attempts to survive the land full of "dogs."

B6521S04E06.description: A woman enters the Black Museum, where the proprietor tells his stories relating to the artifacts.

B6521S05E01.description: Two estranged college friends reunite in later life, triggering a series of events that could alter their lives forever.

B6521S05E02.description: A cab driver with an agenda becomes the center of attention on a day that rapidly spirals out of control.

B6521S05E03.description: A lonely teenager yearns to connect with her favorite pop star - whose charmed existence isn't quite as rosy as it.

B6521S06E01.description: An average woman is stunned to discover a global streaming platform has launched a prestige TV drama adaptation of her life - in which she is portrayed by Hollywood A-lister Salma Hayek.

B6521S06E02.description: A young couple travel to a sleepy Scottish town to start work on a genteel nature documentary - but find themselves drawn to a juicy local story involving shocking events of the past.

B6521S06E03.description: In an alternative 1969, two men on a perilous high-tech mission wrestle with the consequences of an unimaginable tragedy.

B6521S06E04.description: A troubled starlet is dogged by invasive paparazzi while dealing with the consequences of a hit-and-run incident.

B6521S06E05.description: Northern England, 1979. A meek sales assistant is told she must commit terrible acts to prevent a disaster.

B6521S07E01.description: When a medical emergency leaves schoolteacher Amanda fighting for her life, her desperate husband Mike signs her up for Rivermind, a high-tech system that will keep her alive.

B6521S07E02.description: Confectionary whizz kid Maria is unnerved when her former schoolmate Verity joins the company she works at - because there's something altogether odd about Verity, something only Maria seems to notice.

B6521S07E03.description: A high-tech, unusually immersive remake of a vintage British film sends Hollywood A-list star Brandy Friday into another dimension, where she must stick to the script if she ever wants to make it home.

B6521S07E04.description: In a near-future London, an eccentric murder suspect is linked to an unusual video game from the 1990s - a game populated by cute, evolving artificial lifeforms.

B6521S07E05.description: An isolated man is introduced to a groundbreaking system that allows its users to literally step inside old photographs - stirring powerful emotions in the process.

B6521S07E06.description: Robert Daly is dead, but now the crew of the USS Callister - led by Captain Nanette Cole - are stranded in an infinite virtual universe, fighting for survival against 30 million players.

S1542S01E01.description: Delivery driver Michael has big plans for the future with his girlfriend. Until something odd starts happening to him and others across South London.

S1542S01E02.description: Four ordinary Londoners unexpectedly develop superpowers. While one embraces their abilities, another searches for explanations about their newfound gifts.

S1542S01E03.description: Sabrina and Sharleen unwind after work, planning a night out. Meanwhile, a brawl among the Tower Boys leaves Tazer vowing payback. Concurrently, Michael devises a scheme.

S1542S01E04.description: After the bailiffs pay him a visit, Andre makes a dangerous decision. Rodney's business slows down, and Dionne meets the mother of a missing girl.

S1542S01E05.description: When Spud ends up in the hospital, Rodney has a change of heart. Michael decides to tell Dionne everything, but first, he has to find the others.

S1542S01E06.description: Tazer and Sabrina both search for Krazy. Dionne follows up on information about the missing girl. With powers pushed beyond their limit, the five must unite to save the ones they love.

T2005S01E01.description: An optimistic American football coach is hired to lead AFC Richmond, a struggling English soccer club, despite having no experience with the sport.

T2005S01E02.description: On his first full day coaching AFC Richmond, Ted tries to win over Rebecca, connect with his players and face unhappy fans before the club's first match.

T2005S01E03.description: When skeptical journalist Trent Crimm shadows Ted for a day, a community outing with Roy offers a closer look at the new coach's unconventional style.

T2005S01E04.description: At Rebecca's annual charity gala, Ted tackles a brewing locker-room feud while personal drama threatens to upstage the evening.

T2005S01E05.description: Ted's wife and son visit from America as personal strain and mounting pressure at Richmond force a bold decision during a crucial match.

T2005S01E06.description: Ted turns to a gifted new signing when Jamie refuses to train, while Richmond bands together over a strange superstition.

T2005S01E07.description: As AFC Richmond heads to Liverpool for a crucial away match, Rebecca confronts a difficult anniversary and Ted struggles to stay upbeat in the face of painful personal news.

T2005S01E08.description: Ted and Roy turn to the Diamond Dogs for advice on matters of the heart, while Rebecca's past complicates the future of AFC Richmond.

T2005S01E09.description: As Richmond prepares for a crucial match, Ted faces pressure over Roy's future on the pitch, while Rebecca wrestles with the truth behind her plans.

T2005S01E10.description: Richmond plays a climactic match that will determine the fates of Ted and his club.

T2005S02E01.description: AFC Richmond brings in a sports psychologist to help the team overcome their unprecedented seven game tie-streak.

T2005S02E02.description: Ted is surprised by the reappearance of a familiar face; Roy tries out a new gig.

T2005S02E03.description: Rebecca has a special visitor shadow her at work. A player's return is not welcomed by the team.

T2005S02E04.description: It's Christmas in Richmond. Rebecca enlists Ted for a secret mission, Roy and Keeley search for a miracle and the Higginses open up their home.

T2005S02E05.description: Nate learns how to be assertive from Keeley and Rebecca. Ted asks Roy for a favor. Roy reconsiders his future.

T2005S02E06.description: Ted is fired up that the new team dynamic seems to be working. But will they have a chance in the quarter final?

T2005S02E07.description: With things turning around for Richmond, it's time for everyone to work on their issues - like Ted's discomfort, Nate's confidence and Roy's attention.

T2005S02E08.description: Ted and Dr. Sharon realize they might have to meet each other halfway. Tensions are high as the team prepares for their FA Cup semi-final against Man City.

T2005S02E09.description: After the semi-final defeat, Beard sets out on an all-night odyssey through London in order to collect his thoughts.

T2005S02E10.description: Rebecca is stunned by a sudden loss. The team rallies to show their support, but Ted finds himself grappling with a piece of his past.

T2005S02E11.description: A billionaire football enthusiast from Ghana makes Sam an unbelievable offer. Ted plans something special for Dr. Sharon's last day with the team.

T2005S02E12.description: Richmond gets their final chance to win promotion as Ted deals with the fallout of Trent Crimm's painfully honest exposé.

T2005S03E01.description: The newly promoted AFC Richmond face mockery as pundits predict they'll finish dead last.

T2005S03E02.description: News of a top player looking to move to London sends the English clubs into a frenzy. Richmond play their first game back in the Premier League.

T2005S03E03.description: Richmond adjust to an exciting change, but Jamie has reservations. Ted learns there's something new going on back in Kansas as well.

T2005S03E04.description: Everyone's feeling the pressure as Richmond gear up to play West Ham. Ted is reunited with an old friend.

T2005S03E05.description: With their season in a tailspin, Richmond try to right the ship against mighty Manchester City. Off the pitch, everyone faces their own setbacks.

T2005S03E06.description: A friendly match takes the team to Amsterdam, where one night out unlocks truths for many.

T2005S03E07.description: The Greyhounds try a new strategy that has everyone thinking outside the box. Sam prepares to host a VIP guest at Ola's.

T2005S03E08.description: While watching Henry, Ted fights the urge to spiral when Michelle and Dr. Jacob go on a romantic trip. An online leak has massive implications for Keeley.

T2005S03E09.description: Colin and Isaac's friendship is tested. Roy is asked to do a press conference.

T2005S03E10.description: While some of the players head home to play for their countries in International matches, Edwin Akufo brings a business proposal to Rebecca.

T2005S03E11.description: An unanticipated guest has Ted on edge. When Richmond travel to Manchester for a big match, Roy and Keeley become concerned about Jamie.

T2005S03E12.description: Season finale. AFC Richmond play their final match of the season.

T2009S01E01.description: When a Supe kills the love of his life, A/V salesman Hughie Campbell teams up with Billy Butcher, a vigilante hell-bent on punishing corrupt Supes -- and Hughie's life will never be the same again.

T2009S01E02.description: The Boys get themselves a Superhero, Starlight gets payback, Homelander gets naughty, and a Senator gets naughtier.

T2009S01E03.description: It's the race of the century. A-Train versus Shockwave, vying for the title of World's Fastest Man. Meanwhile, the Boys are reunited and it feels so good.

T2009S01E04.description: On a very special episode of The Boys... an hour of guts, gutterballs, airplane hijackings, madness, ghosts, and one very intriguing Female. Oh, and lots of heart -- both in the sentimental sense, and in the gory literal sense.

T2009S01E05.description: The Boys head to the "Believe" Expo to follow a promising lead in their ongoing war against the Supes. There might -- MIGHT -- be a homicidal infant, but you'll have to see for yourself.

T2009S01E06.description: SUPER IN AMERICA (2019). Vought Studios. Genre: Reality. Starring: Homelander, Queen Maeve, Black Noir, The Deep, A-Train, Starlight, Tara Reid, Billy Zane.

T2009S01E07.description: Never trust a washed-up Supe -- the Boys learn this lesson the hard way. Meanwhile, Homelander digs into his past, Starlight discovers that love hurts, and if you're ever in Sandusky, Ohio and a girl asks if she can touch your gills, say NO.

T2009S01E08.description: Season Finale Time! Questions answered! Secrets revealed! Conflicts... conflicted! Characters exploded! And so much more!

T2009S02E01.description: With Butcher still missing, Hughie, Mother's Milk, Frenchie, and Kimiko are now fugitives, and Homelander and Vought are more powerful than ever. But just as the Boys are about to leave the country, they are pulled back into the fray.

T2009S02E02.description: Butcher is back with the Boys, but tensions flare with Hughie. Homelander spends quality time with his new "family." Starlight and Stormfront bond at a press junket and the Boys hunt down a super terrorist with a startling identity.

T2009S02E03.description: The Boys take to the high seas to safeguard their prisoner. Homelander plays house, then pushes Ryan over the edge. Starlight is forced to make an impossible choice. Stormfront reveals her true character.

T2009S02E04.description: Milk, Hughie, and Annie go on a road trip to find Liberty. Frenchie has relationship problems, and Homelander continues to unravel.

T2009S02E05.description: Butcher has no more intentions to fight with Supes but Black Noir traced his location and found him: what will he do now? Supes are shooting a film named - #Dawn Of The Seven. Homelander is doing what Stormfront told him to do.

T2009S02E06.description: When The Boys and Starlight follow a lead to Vought's mysterious Sage Grove Center, they find one of Vought's darkest secrets - and someone even darker from their past. Meanwhile Homelander and Stormfront's relationship deepens.

T2009S02E07.description: To help Victoria Neuman make a case against Vought, Mallory and The Boys look to an unlikely source for answers. Hughie gets terrifying news about Starlight. Meanwhile, Homelander and Stormfront further their master plan for Compound V.

T2009S02E08.description: Becca shows up on Butcher's doorstep and begs for his help. The Boys agree to back Butcher, and together with Starlight, they finally face off against Homelander and Stormfront. But things go very bad, very fast.

T2009S03E01.description: One year following Stormfront's public controversy, Butcher and the Boys now work as contractors for Neuman's Bureau of Superhero Affairs in order to apprehend problematic Supes, with Hughie acting as their liaison.

T2009S03E02.description: Homelander, America's greatest Supe. Defending our shores from sea to shining sea. Today, America honors him on his birthday. Vought Shopping Network is celebrating by offering an exclusive Homelander Limited Birthday Edition Gold Coin.

T2009S03E03.description: Tonight at 9/8C on Vought Plus, it's the season finale of #AmericanHero. Three contestants remain, but only TWO will join #TheSeven. Will Starlight choose her old flame Supersonic? Or will someone else be moving into the Seven Tower?

T2009S03E04.description: The Boys search for a mysterious weapon in Russia while things are brewing behind the scenes at Vought. Plenty of trouble, gore and twists to foresee.

T2009S03E05.description: The Boys run into a major obstacle in their mission to stop the Seven and turn their attention to Soldier Boy. Homelander continues to make changes that fit his agenda at Vought International.

T2009S03E06.description: You’re invited to the 70th Annual Herogasm! You must present this invitation in order to be admitted! Same rules as always: no cameras, no non-Supe guests unless they sign an NDA and they’re DTF, and no telling any news media! It’s BYOD, but food, alcohol and lube will be provided! And please remember to RSVP so we can get an accurate headcount for the caterer!

T2009S03E07.description: Everything's changing as never expected for the Homelander. Soldier Boy is searching for the other old payback members to slay. Black Noir recollects what has really got him to the current situation.

T2009S03E08.description: Calling all patriots! Let's show Homelander we've got his back and we're not going to let Starlight and her House of Horrors get away with trafficking children and drinking their adrenaline! It's time for real Americans to fight back! Join the Hometeamers and Stormchasers tomorrow at Vought Square! Stand back and stand by!

T2009S04E01.description: After Butcher misses his opportunity to kill Homelander by Soldier Boy, he attempts to get Ryan back on his side and correct his mistakes. Meanwhile, Homelander seeks out a new ally as he struggles to come to terms with his mortality.

T2009S04E02.description: Did you know that globalists put chemicals in our food that make us gay, Dakota Bob is a demon from hell, and the Moon isn't real? Find out what they want to keep from us #TruthCon.

T2009S04E03.description: The problems have started between Homelander and Starlight supporters. Hughie tries to figure out what's going on between Homelander and Victoria Neuman.

T2009S04E04.description: Vought News Network is proud to announce its new series #Truthbomb! Join host Firecracker and her celebrity guests for the live 6-hour premiere as they expose Starlight's Adrenochrome Parties!

T2009S04E05.description: While caring for his dying father, Hughie faces intrigue at Vought. Homelander bonds with Ryan, and the Boys break Stan out to obtain the Anti-Supe virus, battling killer sheep along the way.

T2009S04E06.description: Vernon Correctional Services provides compassionate rehabilitation to those in our care to prepare them for successful community reentry. At Vernon, it's not about custody. It's about family.

T2009S04E07.description: Hey kids. Did you know your neighbor, uncle, or even Mom and Dad might be trying to destroy America? Find out how to stop them on the Avenue V Christmas Special!. If you see something, say something!.

T2009S04E08.description: Calling all patriots! We will not allow this stolen election to be certified tomorrow! We must stop Bob Singer's woke anti-Supe agenda! PREPARE FOR WAR! #WhereWeGoOneWeGoVought

T6534S01E01.description: Former Marine Frank Castle takes the law into his own hands while struggling to come to terms with his traumatic past.

T6534S01E02.description: A mysterious phone call forces Frank's hand. Meanwhile, Madani goes digging for suspects and Curtis delivers a message.

T6534S01E03.description: Frank skips the subtlety while interrogating Micro. Brutal memories of top-secret missions shed light on Frank's past.

T6534S01E04.description: Madani and Sam plan a delicate operation. Curtis tries to connect with Lewis. Frank encourages Micro to get his hands dirty.

T6534S01E05.description: Frank and Micro go looking for answers from a reluctant witness. Madani and Sam learn of a looming investigation. Rawlins sees a ghost.

T6534S01E06.description: With Frank in bad shape, Micro calls on Curtis for help. Madani and Russo continue to mix business with pleasure. Lewis stands up for his rights.

T6534S01E07.description: Lewis struggles with the ramifications of his actions. Frank and Micro pursue another face from the past. Madani and Sam go bug hunting.

T6534S01E08.description: Russo opens up to Madani about his past. Sarah shares her concerns about her son with Frank. A decoy operation takes a turn.

T6534S01E09.description: Following a deadly explosion, Karen lands in a bomber's crosshairs -- and Frank isn't happy about it. Meanwhile, Curtis makes a grisly discovery.

T6534S01E10.description: An attack on a high-profile politician is examined (and reexamined) through different perspectives. Madani faces a painful truth.

T6534S01E11.description: As danger knocks on Sarah's door, Frank takes his quest for vengeance to the next level with some help from an ally.

T6534S01E12.description: Frank makes a damning confession. A shootout leaves Sarah wondering what to believe. Rawlins goes in for the kill, once and for all.

T6534S01E13.description: As the authorities close in, an exhausted but unbroken Frank vows to put an end to the war that has consumed his life.

T6534S02E01.description: While driving through Michigan, Frank stops for a beer at a roadside bar. But staying out of trouble has never been his strong suit.

T6534S02E02.description: Frank and a reluctant Rachel go on the run as a menacing adversary gives chase. Meanwhile, Madani pays Russo an unwelcome visit.

T6534S02E03.description: As Pilgrim's past comes into focus, Frank and Rachel find themselves in police custody, where they're anything but safe.

T6534S02E04.description: Rachel recalls the night everything changed and lets Frank in on the truth about her name. Russo sits down with a face from his childhood.

T6534S02E05.description: Frank walks into a trap, but really he's the one setting a trap. Madani opens up to Curtis. Pilgrim plans a visit to an unholy land.

T6534S02E06.description: Amy (previously know as Rachel) develops photographs that point to a conspiracy. Russo reads his own report. Madani's story about Russo comes under fire.

T6534S02E07.description: Madani's quest to ID Pilgrim hits a wall. Russo and his crew put their plan into action. Frank encounters someone from the past.

T6534S02E08.description: Painful memories take ahold of Russo. Frank's frustration frightens those closest to him. Madani receives a visitor bearing a warning.

T6534S02E09.description: A big bounty inspires New York's worst to pursue the Punisher. A restless Amy seeks help from a fellow grifter. Russo and Krista consider the future.

T6534S02E10.description: As Madani and Krista debate who's worth saving, Frank prepares to storm Russo's territory. A brutal encounter pushes Pilgrim back into old habits.

T6534S02E11.description: Amy rushes to protect Frank, who lies defenseless in a hospital. Pilgrim gets some crushing news, and Karen Page calls in a favor.

T6534S02E12.description: Buckle up -- Mahoney and Frank are about to take a ride to remember. Amy makes an entrance, Russo cashes out, and Madani comes clean to Krista.

T6534S02E13.description: Frank, Pilgrim, Madani, Russo, Amy, Curt and the Schultz family. No bullet is left unspent as season two comes to an explosive conclusion.

T1054S01E01.description: Everything in Scott McCall's life is starting to fall into place. He gets a spot on the First Line of his Lacrosse team and a date with the woman of his dreams. But when he gets bitten by a wolf, the people around him could be in danger.

T1054S01E02.description: Scott and Stiles discover that the werewolf curse can also be triggered by anger, besides the full moon. With the lacrosse game coming up, Jackson and his girlfriend, Lydia, hope to humiliate Scott. Will Scott be able to control his rage?

T1054S01E03.description: Scott is shaken when his vivid dream of a mauling aboard a school-bus turns out to have actually happened. Scott turns to Derek for help, but Derek warns him that his help will not be free. Meanwhile Scott's long awaited date with Allison turns into a group date and Scott gets bowling help from Allison.

T1054S01E04.description: Allison's aunt comes to town and shoots a shadowy werewolf figure with a special bullet that she estimates will kill it within 48 hours. Derek is the one hit and insists that Scott and Stiles help him.

T1054S01E05.description: Lydia and Jackson witness a werewolf attack at the video store. Stiles is worried for his father, the sheriff. Allison's aunt gives her a family heirloom and encourages her to use it to learn more about the family history. Scott and Allison play hooky on her birthday. Derek confronts Jackson about what he saw the night before. Derek gets a surprise visit. At the parent teacher conferences Scott's mom and Allison's father find out they both skipped school that day... After the conference someone pulls a gun...and uses it.

T1054S01E06.description: Scott and Stiles are on the outs after Stiles dad gets hurt, but when Derek insists that Scott avoid Allison, Scott turns to Stiles to help him master his anger with the help of a heart monitor. Meanwhile Jackson is feeling the effects of having been scratched and approaches Allison claiming to want to get to know her and Scott better.

T1054S01E07.description: Responding to Scott's howl, the alpha savages Derek and traps Scott and Stiles in their high school. Events escalate even further when Allison, Jackson, and Lydia are lured to the school as well with a phony text message.

T1054S01E08.description: As Scott's second full moon approaches, he gives in to his animal urges and hurts Stiles but Stiles gets a measure of revenge in locking him up. Meanwhile Jackson continues to try and get closer to Allison. The Argents learn that Scott somehow knew Derek.

T1054S01E09.description: Jackson discovers that he has aconite poisoning and thinks he's figured out what's up with Scott. Meanwhile, Derek hides from the manhunt in Stiles' room while Stiles and Scott try to get Allison's necklace and any clues that may lead to the identity of the alpha. Teammate Danny lends Stiles his internet expertise to help in the search.

T1054S01E10.description: The Alpha finally reveals himself to Scott and gives him an idea why he's killed certain people. Argent stages an encounter thinking that Jackson may be a werewolf. Meanwhile Allison discovers a bit more about her family's secrets and confronts Lydia about her kissing Scott.

T1054S01E11.description: Kate Argent has Derek chained up in a basement following her attack on his house and shows him off to Allison, before torturing him. The coach has banned Scott from the Spring Formal in exchange for not dropping him from the team (for academic reasons) Scott intimidates Jackson into escorting Allison to the dance and she asks Lydia to escort Stiles.

T1054S01E12.description: After his daughter Allison sees Argent fail in his attempt to run Scott down with his car, Argent decides to send Allison and his sister Kate to Washington. Stiles convinces Peter (the alpha) to spare Lydia's life after he bites her but in return he must help the alpha locate Derek. Meanwhile Jackson is called to get Lydia to the hospital, and Scott must cope with the girl he loves knowing his secret.

T1054S02E01.description: When Lydia goes missing from the hospital, Scott, Stiles, and Allison need to find her before the Argents' hunting party does. Jackson's body seems to be rejecting "the bite" that Derek gave him.

T1054S02E02.description: When Isaac's dad is killed, Isaac is arrested and there's a full moon coming. Scott and Derek check out his house while the Argent's send someone to the jail to deal with what they suspect is the town's newest werewolf. Meanwhile Jackson makes arrangements to film his first full moon since being bitten.

T1054S02E03.description: Scott and Stiles take Allison and Lydia on an ice skating date. Derek converts Erica. Mrs. Argent begins to suspect that Allison is still seeing Scott despite her promise not to.

T1054S02E04.description: The lizard-like shape-shifter continues its killing spree with Stiles narrowly escaping twice, and saving Derek in the bargain. Allison's grandpa/principal attends his first lacrosse match and brings a surprise guest to dinner at the Argent house.

T1054S02E05.description: When Derek decides that Lydia must be the lizard shifter and that she must die, the gang must all pitch in to see that she's safe.

T1054S02E06.description: When it becomes apparent that Jackson is the Kanima, Scott chases him and rescues Allison's dad but is seen by her grand-dad. Scott and Stiles finally catch up with Jackson/the Kanima where he's stalking Danny in a gay club.

T1054S02E07.description: When Jackson escapes from the prisoner transport van that Stiles and Scott had him in, Jackson's father gets a restraining order to keep the two of them away from Jackson. Scott's mother searches his room and discovers that Scott has been having sex with Allison and lets her mother know. The gang learn that the Kanima may need to resolve some past trauma before it can fully transform into a werewolf so they begin to investigate Jackson's past.

T1054S02E08.description: Scott, with the help of his friends and Dr Deaton try to stop the kanima from claiming its next victim at an upcoming warehouse rave. While most of the Argent crew plan to intercept and kill the kanima, Mrs. Argent makes a plan of her own, but is surprised at the outcome.

T1054S02E09.description: Peter appears to Lydia in her dreams and convinces her to do something "special" for her birthday party this year, which just happens to fall on the full moon. Meanwhile Derek makes certain that his pack of new wolves are restrained for their first full-moon.

T1054S02E10.description: Scott and Stiles (along with their single parents) are trapped in the sheriff's department by the kanima and its controller. Outside the station, the Argents, under the direction of their new leader, come looking to end the kanima and Derek.

T1054S02E11.description: It's the night of the championship game and Scott is riding the bench as academically ineligible, meanwhile he must keep Gerard from unleashing the kanima on the unsuspecting crowd. Knowing that Scott will be busy, Allison and her father hunt down two of Derek's pack.

T1054S02E12.description: Following Jackson's apparent death on the lacrosse field, Scott and the others discover that he's not dead but may just be transforming into a more powerful form. As we finally learn Gerard's real plan, help comes to the werewolves from an unexpected quarter.

T1054S03E01.description: In the season premiere, a new Alpha Pack arrives to wreak havoc on Scott's life while Derek and Isaac struggle to locate Erica and Boyd.

T1054S03E02.description: Allison and Lydia stumble upon a possible clue to finding Boyd and Erica while a childhood friend of Stiles goes missing.
