T1054S03E03.description: With Boyd and Cora on the loose and under the influence of the full moon, Scott and Derek must turn to an unlikely ally for help.

T1054S03E04.description: While Scott tries to keep Isaac from engaging in a deadly confrontation with the Twins in school, Stiles attempts to prove his theory that the killings have nothing to do with werewolves.

T1054S03E05.description: During a bus ride to a cross country meet, Scott and his friends flash back to the events of a preemptive strike against the Alphas that has left several injured and possibly one or more dead.

T1054S03E06.description: Stranded at a motel for the night because of the postponed cross country meet, Scott and the others suffer strange experiences that cause them to believe members of their own group may be the mysterious killer's newest targets.

T1054S03E07.description: As the danger begins to reach closer to Scott, threatening his trusted mentor and boss, Deaton, Kali and the Twins go after Derek.

T1054S03E08.description: Seeking answers, Scott, Allison and Stiles hear stories told by two unlikely narrators and discover a secret about the color of a werewolf's eyes.

T1054S03E09.description: As Allison begins to suspect someone dangerously close to her may be involved in the murders, Scott and Stiles conclude that Lydia's rising talents may be their best bet to solving the murders.

T1054S03E10.description: Trapped inside an evacuated Beacon Hills hospital by a powerful storm, Scott and Derek must defend themselves against the Alphas while trying to figure out how to save Cora's life.

T1054S03E11.description: With the threat growing far more personal and time running out on innocent lives, Scott is forced to make a difficult choice in order to save both friends and family while, at the same time, Derek and Peter try to figure out how to save Cora's life.

T1054S03E12.description: Under Deaton's advice, Scott and his friends use an ancient but extremely dangerous ritual to help them both save the lives of the people they love and stop Deucalion from achieving his sinister goal.

T1054S03E13.description: After a near death experience from the Nemeton Scott, Stiles and Alison start hallucinating and a dark curse is left upon which makes their life hell.

T1054S03E14.description: Scott and his friends race to figure out how to catch the Werecoyote before it's hunted down while Derek and Peter are broken out of captivity by an unlikely ally.

T1054S03E15.description: The twins are back in high school and look to join Scott's pack while a killer escapes from hospital for his next target in high school.

T1054S03E16.description: Beacon Hills is under curfew from the power outage; the teens throw a blacklight Halloween party; Scott tries to earn Kira's trust.

T1054S03E17.description: The gang finally figures out who or what is behind the mask.

T1054S03E18.description: Stiles is kidnapped and the pack search for him.

T1054S03E19.description: Stiles is back and Scott must prevent a disaster; Lydia and Allison seek help from an unlikely source.

T1054S03E20.description: Stiles is put into a mental hospital where he believes he will be safe from the Nogitsune. Will he be as far away from it as he thinks or closer than ever? Meanwhile Scott, Allison and Lydia look for a cure for Stiles.

T1054S03E21.description: While Allison, Derek, Chris and Sheriff Stilinski try to track down Nogitsune, Kira's mother tells the story of the Nogitsune she came to know.

T1054S03E22.description: With the Nogitsune still in control of their friend, Scott and Lydia find an unlikely ally in Peter Hale. Elsewhere, the effects of the Nogitsune have given Chris, Alison and Kira some trouble with four out-of-control werewolves.

T1054S03E23.description: Scott and company race to rescue Lydia from the clutches of evil as the Nogitsune makes a surprise move, resulting in a tragic loss to the group.

T1054S03E24.description: Struck by disaster and nearly defeated, Scott and Derek call on their friends and allies to make one last stand.

T1054S04E01.description: After the heartache of losing two of their own, Scott has an unexpected visit from an old friend. Does this mean they can reunite their pack or are there evil intentions at play?

T1054S04E02.description: Scott is anxious to end Kate's plan but first they must team up with an unlikely ally.

T1054S04E03.description: While Stilinski investigates a murder, Scott has his place on the Lacrosse team threatened by a freshman.

T1054S04E04.description: The gang must not only convince Liam that he is a werewolf, but must do it before the full moon that night. Lydia also finds out about the dead pool.

T1054S04E05.description: As another name is scratched off the list, Lydia is required to find the second key, thus revealing more targets. Scott, Stiles and Kira are on high alert after realizing that the assassin is on the lacrosse team.

T1054S04E06.description: With Violet's arrest, Garrett forces Scott to help get her back by using Liam as a bargaining chip. Stiles, Lydia and Jordan seek Meredith's help to uncover the third key.

T1054S04E07.description: A frantic call to the CDC has everyone paranoid, especially since it was designed to target werewolves. Scott, Malia and Kira lock themselves in the Hale vault, unaware of their salvation within their grasp.

T1054S04E08.description: With Noshiko's help, the team come up with a plan hoping to reveal the benefactor's identity. But Kate's arrival threatens to ruin it all. Malia comes face-to-face with Peter in the Hale vault, thus delving into her past.

T1054S04E09.description: After a vain attempt to kill Parrish, it's clear that almost everyone has access to the dead-pool. Lydia dives into her grandmother's past, uncovering yet another list which leads her to Eichen House. The team soon realizes no one is safe.

T1054S04E10.description: Meredith is brought in for questioning, but refuses to talk to anyone but Peter. Stiles and Malia head over to the lake house wherein lies the dead-pool. Scott, Derek, Kira and some others take a stand against the assassins out for blood.

T1054S04E11.description: Deaton visits Eichen House in a search for answers to Derek's situation; Liam's horrific hallucinations costs a win for the lacrosse team; Scott plans a magical night for Kira and himself which soon turns into a nightmare beyond imagination.

T1054S04E12.description: In order to save the pack from Kate, Scott and Stiles return to La Iglesia.

T1054S05E01.description: On the eve of the start of senior year, Scott and his pack are challenged by the arrival of a new enemy.

T1054S05E02.description: Lydia helps a student with nightmares, while Stiles is wary of a new classmate.

T1054S05E03.description: Scott tracks a dangerous shapeshifter that has been threatening Stilinski.

T1054S05E04.description: Stiles works on tracking down a fugitive; Liam tries to be Mason's wingman at a nightclub.

T1054S05E05.description: The pack enters Eichen House in order to learn more about the Dread Doctors.

T1054S05E06.description: Scott and his friends follow Dr. Valack's advice and experience strange effects as a result.

T1054S05E07.description: Scott tries to trap one of the doctors. Meanwhile Stiles and Theo try to figure out who is taking the dead bodies.

T1054S05E08.description: Scott and Malia get help to try to find Hayden and Liam. Deaton discovers something horrific about the dread doctors. Hayden and Liam will be faced with a life and death situation.

T1054S05E09.description: While Scott turns to an unlikely ally for help, Stiles and Lydia try to uncover the truth about Parrish.

T1054S05E10.description: With both lives and friendships on the verge of being destroyed, Scott and his pack face their greatest enemy yet.

T1054S05E11.description: Scott, Malia, & Stiles scramble to find a way to save Sheriff Stilinski from an unknown toxin while Liam & Mason search for the whereabouts of Hayden's body and the other dead chimera bodies.

T1054S05E12.description: Without the support of his pack, Scott considers that the Dread Doctor's success could mean for Beacon Hills.

T1054S05E13.description: Kira's mother sets out on a journey with Kira to help her maintain control of her dark side; Lydia receives a surprise at Eichen House.

T1054S05E14.description: As Scott tries to put his pack back together, Malia and her new ally set out to rescue Deaton from The Desert Wolf.

T1054S05E15.description: After finding out that Lydia is in danger, Stiles makes a plan to break her out of Eichen House; Theo has his own plans as he joins Deucalion in a quest to kill Scott.

T1054S05E16.description: While trapped in Eichen House with Theo and the Chimera pack, Scott tries to rescue Lydia before time runs out.

T1054S05E17.description: Scott and the pack try to use a charity lacrosse game to figure out the identity of the Beast.

T1054S05E18.description: The Pack are trying to figure out how to defeat the Beast of Gévaudan that the Maid of Gévaudan, Marie-Jeanne Valet, faced in 1765. As Gerard Argent, recounts Valet's story to Scott's pack in hopes they can deduce the creature's weaknesses.

T1054S05E19.description: Now that the beast's identity is known, Scott and his pack race against time to stop the Dread Doctors.

T1054S05E20.description: Loyalties are tested and new alliances forged as Scott and his friends work to stop the Beast before Beacon Hills is razed to the ground.

T1054S06E01.description: A supernatural force crosses paths with Scott and his friends; Liam finds evidence of a new enemy at the high school.

T1054S06E02.description: While Scott, Lydia, and Malia search for lost memories of a missing friend, Corey discovers a connection between his abilities and The Wild Hunt.

T1054S06E03.description: While Scott, Lydia and Malia search for Stiles, Liam and the others throw a party to keep Gwen safe from the Ghost Riders.

T1054S06E04.description: Chris Argent and Malia Tate protect the others that were marked by the ghost riders. Scott, Liam, Hayden, Mason, and Corey help protect the lacrosse team from the ghost riders while Lydia tries to find clues about Stiles.

T1054S06E05.description: Trapped inside the Wild Hunt, Stiles reunites with an unexpected ally while Scott, Lydia and Malia discover Stiles's Jeep may be connected to his disappearance.

T1054S06E06.description: Scott, Lydia and Malia search for clues about the Wild Hunt in a mysterious place called Canaan while Liam and Hayden resort to drastic measures in the fight against the Ghost Riders.

T1054S06E07.description: Scott and Liam make an attempt to capture a Ghost Rider; Malia and Peter try to find a way into the Wild Hunt.

T1054S06E08.description: Scott, Lydia and Malia decide to storm the rift and rescue Stiles. Liam, Hayden and Mason make a deal with Theo to learn Garrett Douglas's plan.

T1054S06E09.description: While Liam and Theo act as decoys, Scott, Lydia and Malia enact a desperate plan to try and remember Stiles.

T1054S06E10.description: With the fate of Beacon Hills hanging in the balance, Scott and his pack face off against Douglas in a final showdown.

T1054S06E11.description: As Scott readies Beacon Hills for this imminent departure, a mysterious presence breaks out of Eichen House.

T1054S06E12.description: Scott and Malia search for the owner of a unique bullet, fearing that a new breed of werewolf hunter has come to Beacon Hills. At the same time, Lydia must face her own fears of Eichen House.

T1054S06E13.description: While Scott and the others desperately pursue a missing werewolf, Melissa and Argent investigate the nature of a strange body.

T1054S06E14.description: Scott, Lydia and Malia have to take drastic measures to quell the growing violence in Beacon Hills, while Liam endures his own gauntlet at the high school.

T1054S06E15.description: When Scott and the others try to protect two new werewovles, an unlikely ally joins the fight.

T1054S06E16.description: Liam and Theo attempt to draw the Hunters away from Beacon Hills.

T1054S06E17.description: After a shocking attack leaves the pack reeling, Scott sets out to recruit reinforcements.

T1054S06E18.description: The battle lines are drawn, with Scott's pack and Gerard's hunters ready for war.

T1054S06E19.description: Chris turns to an unexpected ally, while Scott and Malia learn how to fight blindly with the help of Deucalion. Nolan warns Liam about everyone living in Beacon Hills.

T1054S06E20.description: Gerard initiates the final attack on the supernatural creatures of Beacon Hills

B2160S01E01.description: Struggling lawyer Jimmy McGill tries to leave his seedy past behind him, but old habits die hard when a big opportunity presents itself.

B2160S01E02.description: In a tense and violent standoff with dangerous criminals, Jimmy will live or die based on his own powers of persuasion.

B2160S01E03.description: With the cops holding his dangerous new client, Jimmy tries to point the police in another direction while saving his own skin in the process.

B2160S01E04.description: A desperate Jimmy gets creative in order to drum up new business and manages to sneak in a little revenge for good measure.

B2160S01E05.description: Eccentric new clients keep Jimmy afloat while Chuck's agoraphobia erupts into a police standoff, forcing Jimmy to choose between cashing in on oddballs and safeguarding his brother's fragile image.

B2160S01E06.description: Mike's days as a police officer in Philadelphia catch up to him when he's questioned about a tragic event from his past.

B2160S01E07.description: Jimmy's new clients put him at personal and professional crossroads, so he calls in a favor for some covert assistance.

B2160S01E08.description: Dumpster diving at Sandpiper Crossing, Jimmy uncovers systemic billing fraud, teams with a newly energized Chuck, and files a class action that finally makes courtroom glory feel within reach.

B2160S01E09.description: Jimmy's big case forces him to swallow his pride and look for help from an unlikely source. Mike gets back in the job market.

B2160S01E10.description: Reeling, Jimmy reunites with con-buddy Marco for one last Cicero scam spree, finds bittersweet closure, and drives off vowing never again to ignore the easy-money road--setting Saul Goodman in motion.

B2160S02E01.description: Jimmy embraces a carefree new ethic, scamming a stockbroker with Kim before finally accepting the Davis and Main job, while Mike rejects Nacho's plot against Hector Salamanca.

B2160S02E02.description: Mike tries to defuse a volatile situation before it blows up in his face. Meanwhile, Jimmy's old instincts kick in as he works to clear an eccentric client.

B2160S02E03.description: To boost the Sandpiper suit, Jimmy secretly films an eye-catching TV ad after staging bus-stop pitches in Amarillo, winning new clients but drawing stern scrutiny from Chuck and HHM.

B2160S02E04.description: Mike weighs a lucrative offer that could lead him into murky waters. Jimmy scrambles to repair the damage from his rogue campaign.

B2160S02E05.description: Flashbacks reveal Chuck's once-charmed marriage to Rebecca; in the present Kim toils in document purgatory as Jimmy schemes, and Chuck quietly undermines them both.

B2160S02E06.description: Jimmy finds comfort in a familiar place, while Kim weighs a life-changing proposal. An alarming new threat pushes Mike to the limit.

B2160S02E07.description: Jimmy stumbles on a colorful solution to his problems at Davis and Main. Kim grows restless as she waits for a juicy offer to materialize.

B2160S02E08.description: As Mike faces pressure from all sides, he tries to regain control of his own fate. Jimmy pursues a new opportunity that rises unexpectedly.

B2160S02E09.description: After a humiliating setback at work, Chuck vows to reveal Jimmy's true nature to Kim. Mike makes a bold move against Hector Salamanca.

B2160S02E10.description: Jimmy rushes to aid a hospitalized Chuck, only to confess his document fraud--unaware Chuck is secretly recording; at the Mexican border Mike's sniper plan against Hector is halted by a mysterious warning.

B2160S03E01.description: As Chuck plots his next move, another lie comes back to haunt Jimmy. A rattled Mike tries to find out who's been tracking his movements - and how.

B2160S03E02.description: Jimmy and Kim hire an assistant. Mike seeks out a mysterious acquaintance and Chuck uses the law to gain an advantage over Jimmy.

B2160S03E03.description: Jimmy decides to represent a new client, much to Kim's dismay. Meanwhile, Mike meets a formidable ally who presents him an enticing offer.

B2160S03E04.description: Jimmy calls in a favor from Mike. Meanwhile, new complications disrupt the Salamancas' business; and Chuck and Jimmy struggle to compromise.

B2160S03E05.description: Kim and Jimmy face off with Chuck and Howard at the New Mexico Bar Association hearing.

B2160S03E06.description: Jimmy is back in the commercial making business. Chuck pushes himself to the limit. Nacho finds himself ensnared in a power struggle.

B2160S03E07.description: Jimmy tries to settle his debts. Nacho reunites with an old acquaintance. Mike helps Stacey with a project and makes a meaningful connection.

B2160S03E08.description: Jimmy is pushed to desperate measures. Nacho picks up a skill and Mike explores an alliance. Kim stands up to Hamlin.

B2160S03E09.description: Jimmy visits Irene at Sandpiper Crossing to see how the class action lawsuit is going; Chuck and Howard spar over the future of the firm; and Kim faces challenges after deciding to take on a new client.

B2160S03E10.description: Kim resolves to take some time off from work, while Jimmy does his best to make amends; Nacho takes a major gamble with his future; Hamlin applies pressure on Chuck to finally make a decision.

B2160S04E01.description: Jimmy struggles to cope with Chuck's tragic incident. Mike ponders his role at Madrigal. Howard makes a startling confession.

B2160S04E02.description: Jimmy seeks new employment. Gus navigates the fallout from Hector's collapse. Kim endeavors to support Jimmy in the wake of Chuck's death.

B2160S04E03.description: Jimmy puts a risky plan into motion. As alliances shift, Nacho finds himself in the crosshairs and Kim contemplates her future.

B2160S04E04.description: A restless Jimmy embarks on a new endeavor while Mike burns bridges. Kim pursues her bliss and Nacho tries to survive a turf war

B2160S04E05.description: Jimmy identifies a new market for his talents; Mike vets a potential partnership; Kim drives a hard bargain.

B2160S04E06.description: While Jimmy daydreams about reconstituting Wexler-McGill, Kim sets out to secure her own future; Mike puts a plan into motion for Gus.

B2160S04E07.description: Jimmy runs into a problem as he expands his business that only Kim can solve. Gus gets involved in Hector's medical care. Mike has to deal with a setback.

B2160S04E08.description: Jimmy goes to great lengths to right a wrong, as Kim pulls out all the stops for a case. Mike lets his team blow off steam and Nacho receives a visitor.

B2160S04E09.description: Jimmy attends his reinstatement hearing at the Bar Association. Nacho is forced to make the rounds with Lalo and Mike has cause to worry.

B2160S04E10.description: Lalo tails Mike as he attempts to track down Werner; Jimmy and Kim invoke the memory of Chuck for the Bar Association appeal hearing.

B2160S05E01.description: Lalo searches for the mysterious Michael. Now doing business as Saul Goodman, Jimmy unveils an unorthodox strategy that tests Kim's tolerance.

B2160S05E02.description: Jimmy's promotional stunt has unintended consequences. Nacho takes extreme measures to earn Lalo's trust. Saul is a success at the courthouse but still has yet to win Kim over. Simmering with rage and self-loathing, Mike loses his temper.

B2160S05E03.description: Jimmy's business enters uncharted territory. Kim's confidence is tested when she's faced with a legal problem only she can solve. Nacho navigates increased pressure from Gus. Mike continues to spiral.

B2160S05E04.description: As Jimmy doubles down on "Saul Goodman," a deeply conflicted Kim brings him an interesting proposition. Gus makes a sacrifice in order to play the long game. Mike attempts to smooth things over with his family.

B2160S05E05.description: As she and Jimmy grow closer over their campaign to help a client, Kim makes a surprising call. Mike is restless during his out-of-town recuperation.

B2160S05E06.description: Kim has a change of heart, but Saul is determined to stick it to Mesa Verde; Mike turns the heat up on Lalo; Nacho attempts to enlist support from above.

B2160S05E07.description: Jimmy and Kim build a legal firewall with help from Huell. Kim sets things straight with her clients as Jimmy is compromised by his and Gus calms troubled waters in service of his plot to build an empire. Mike does damage control.

B2160S05E08.description: When a simple errand for a client goes sideways, Jimmy is pushed to the limit; Mike takes measures to contain the wrath of the cartel; Lalo gets an unexpected visitor.

B2160S05E09.description: In the wake of Jimmy's traumatic misadventure, Kim takes stock of what is important; Jimmy attempts to return to business as usual, but it's more difficult than anticipated; Gus and Mike set a plan in motion.

B2160S05E10.description: Jimmy and Kim make a sideways move that takes a serious turn; Nacho gets closer to the cartel than he'd like.

B2160S06E01.description: Nacho runs for his life. Saul and Kim hatch a plan to mess with Howard. Mike questions his allegiances.

B2160S06E02.description: Kim and Saul enlist some familiar faces in their scheme to get Howard. Harsh realities dawn on Nacho. Gus investigates his suspicions.

B2160S06E03.description: Still on the run, Nacho is forced to choose where his loyalties lie. Saul must decide whether he wants to remain a "friend of the cartel" after his reputation is called into question. Gus and Mike ready the team for a meet.

B2160S06E04.description: Despite assurances from the cartel, Gus takes extreme measures to protect himself against looming threats. Kim and Saul enlist the help of a local pro to put on a show for Cliff Main. Howard seeks outside counsel.

B2160S06E05.description: While business booms for Jimmy, the vise tightens on the cat-and-mouse game between Gus and Lalo.

B2160S06E06.description: Kim and Jimmy enlist a knowledgeable contact. Howard scrutinizes Jimmy's business practices.

B2160S06E07.description: Lalo stakes out his next target. Jimmy and Kim deal with a last-minute curveball. Mike and Gus prepare for a confrontation.

B2160S06E08.description: An unexpected visitor forces Jimmy and Kim to face the consequences of their actions.

B2160S06E09.description: Gus attempts to smooth things over with the cartel while Mike ties up loose ends as Jimmy and Kim deal with the repercussions of their actions.

B2160S06E10.description: A lost dog leads to a new friend. A new player gets in the game.

B2160S06E11.description: The partners escalate their enterprise to new levels.

B2160S06E12.description: The stakes are raised when a discovery is made that will send shockwaves far and wide.

B2160S06E13.description: Revelations. Regrets. RICO violations. Jimmy's worlds - and identities - converge in one final showdown.

B5134S01E01.description: Jimmy Keene is living in the fast lane - until he gets a 10-year prison sentence. Behind bars, he's approached about a high-stakes deal for freedom.

B5134S01E02.description: Agent McCauley prepares Jimmy for the mission. Detective Miller questions Larry about the missing women, leading to a polygraph test.

B5134S01E03.description: Struggling with his transition to maximum security prison, Jimmy initiates a friendship with Larry. New holes in Larry's stories are uncovered.

B5134S01E04.description: In the aftermath of a prison riot, Jimmy and Larry find themselves with time to learn more about each other.

B5134S01E05.description: Jimmy's mounting fear and paranoia compel him to provoke Larry. McCauley and Miller have a breakthrough. Larry's therapist grows concerned.

B5134S01E06.description: Jimmy reaches his breaking point. Larry becomes suspicious. McCauley and Miller talk to an important person in Larry's life.

T7645S01E01.description: Hostile townsfolk and a cunning mage greet Geralt in the town of Blaviken. Ciri finds her royal world upended when Nilfgaard sets its sights on Cintra.

T7645S01E02.description: Bullied and neglected, Yennefer accidentally finds a means of escape. Geralt's hunt for a so-called devil goes to hell. Ciri seeks safety in numbers.

T7645S01E03.description: Geralt takes on another Witcher's unfinished business in a kingdom stalked by a ferocious beast. At a brutal cost, Yennefer forges a magical new future.

T7645S01E04.description: Against his better judgment, Geralt accompanies Jaskier to a royal ball. Ciri wanders into an enchanted forest. Yennefer tries to protect her charges.

T7645S01E05.description: Heedless of warnings, Yennefer looks for a cure to restore what she's lost. Geralt inadvertently puts Jaskier in peril. The search for Ciri intensifies.

T7645S01E06.description: A mysterious man tries to entice Geralt to join a hunt for a rampaging dragon, a quest that attracts a familiar face. Ciri questions who she can trust.

T7645S01E07.description: With the Continent at risk from Nilfgaard's rising power, Yennefer revisits her past, while Geralt reconsiders his obligation to the Law of Surprise.

T7645S01E08.description: A terrifying pack of foes lays Geralt low. Yennefer and her fellow mages prepare to fight back. A shaken Ciri depends on the kindness of a stranger.

T7645S02E01.description: Geralt sets off with Ciri on a journey that leads him to an old friend. After the battle of Sodden, Tissaia shows no mercy in her search for information.

T7645S02E02.description: Seeking a safe place for Ciri, Geralt heads for home, but danger lurks everywhere - even Kaer Morhen. Yennefer's dreams could be the key to her freedom.

B3524S01E01.description: Easy Company goes through training under the leadership of a captain who relentlessly pushes them to their limits but may be limited as a leader in the field.

B3524S01E02.description: Easy Company paratroopers jump behind enemy lines in Normandy on D-Day and struggle to reunite in hostile territory.

B3524S01E03.description: Easy Company takes on German troops in the French town of Carentan, and the battle takes its toll on one soldier who is badly traumatized by the experience.

B3524S01E04.description: With the addition of many new men, Easy Company heads to the Netherlands to participate in Operation Market Garden and prepare an Allied route into Germany, but they meet stiff German resistance.

B3524S01E05.description: Winters writes a report on the challenge of an unexpected resistance to a German attack, and is haunted by his conscience after shooting a teenage German SS soldier.

B3524S01E06.description: In the dead of winter, the men of Easy Company fend off frostbite and hunger - in addition to the enemy - while holding the line in a forest outside of Bastogne. Meanwhile, exhausted medic Eugene Roe finds friendship with a Belgian nurse.

B3524S01E07.description: Easy Company remains in the Ardennes Forest preparing for an inevitable attack on German forces in the town of Foy. However, morale is low due to cold weather, constant shelling, poor leadership, and numerous casualties.

B3524S01E08.description: Easy Company is in Hagenau in February 1945, where they prepare for a night patrol mission to capture German prisoners. The patrol includes one veteran who is despised for missing Bastogne and a new lieutenant fresh out of West Point.

B3524S01E09.description: As the Allies move into Germany and the war comes closer to an end, disillusionment and anger set in for Easy Company - until they stumble onto a concentration camp abandoned by the German military.

B3524S01E10.description: As the Germans surrender, it appears that the hard days for Easy Company are over when they are stationed in Austria. However, they soon learn that those soldiers without enough service points will be sent to fight in Japan.

B8457S01E01.description: After completing his 15 year prison sentence, an ex-con tracks down his former partner, now known as Carrie Hopewell

B8457S01E02.description: Kai Proctor begins the process of co-opting Sheriff Hood but Lucas isn't biting.

B8457S01E03.description: Anastasia breaks into her father's extremely secure home to make a deal for her safety.

B8457S01E04.description: Lucas sets off an alarm while trying to steal a painting from the Harrisburg State Museum. He contacts Job to help him break out.

B8457S01E05.description: A motorcycle gang invades Banshee. They attack Carrie and Sugar at the town Spirit Festival.

B8457S01E06.description: An ex-prison mate friend of Sheriff Hood named Wicks shows up unexpectedly in Banshee.

B8457S01E07.description: Ana makes arrangements to kidnap Hood and leave him for Rabbit to find.

B8457S01E08.description: Olek finds Ana and Hood in Banshee. The ensuing showdown results in dire consequences.

B8457S01E09.description: Hood rushes Ana to the hospital after finding her badly beaten and suffering.

B8457S01E10.description: Rabbit sends a hit squad after Lucas. He is saved by an unlikely ally.

B8457S02E01.description: The fallout from the rescue of Sheriff Lucas is at hand. Special Agent Racine is in town to investigate.

B8457S02E02.description: Carrie Hopewell has her trial. She is sentenced to 30 days in prison. DA Hopewell does nothing to help.

B8457S02E03.description: A young Kinaho girl is murdered on Amish land. She was seeing Soloman, the little brother of Rebecca.

B8457S02E04.description: Lucas questions an Amish teacher who is known to be violent and somewhat radical.

B8457S02E05.description: Carrie is let out of prison. Lucas is waiting on her. They take a detour to the house they talked about so long ago.

B8457S02E06.description: Gordon and Deva find that they need Carrie in their lives and Rebecca receives a lesson in loyalty from Proctor.

B8457S02E07.description: Hood goes after Proctor with a vengeance after he discovers that Proctor was behind Jason's death.

B8457S02E08.description: Job gets a lead on the whereabouts of Rabbit. Lucas arrests Proctor,

B8457S02E09.description: Rabbit is hiding in a New York church. Job pays him a visit. Burton does what he does best.

B8457S02E10.description: Proctor gets out of jail. With Juliet gone and Alex visiting the slaughter house in his absence, Rebecca's allegiance is in question.

B8457S03E01.description: With Rabbit dead and Emmet's death avenged, Banshee has since been nothing but a quiet town.

B8457S03E02.description: Nola returns to Banshee. Proctor's mother ails from a disease.

B8457S03E03.description: Nola and Burton have a bloody confrontation. Tommy defies Chayton's orders and attacks Proctor's club.

B8457S03E04.description: Carrie quits her job at the diner. Deva steals from a video game store.

B8457S03E05.description: Cadi becomes a war zone when Chayton and the Red Bones attack the station with Hood

B8457S03E06.description: Hood copes with Siobhan's death. The FBI takes over in the hunt for Chayton.

B8457S03E07.description: Chayton receives aid from an unexpected source. Gordon and Carrie break Deva out of a party.

B8457S03E08.description: Hood and Brock track down Chayton to Louisiana. Rebecca makes new enemies for her uncle.

B8457S03E09.description: Proctor is captured and tortured. Gordon makes a difficult decision about Deva.

B8457S03E10.description: Hood joins forces with Gordon to save his friends from Stowe.

B8457S04E01.description: A New Challenge for Banshee PA's Crew of misfits as season 4 opens to heightened problems needing to be fixed on both sides of the Law.

B8457S04E02.description: Carrie turns vigilante, while Brock suspects Lucas in the serial killings.

B8457S04E03.description: Job is being tortured. With help of Fat Au, Carrie and Hood find the man who took Job from the camp.

B8457S04E04.description: Hood has been arrested for Rebecca's murder. FBI agent Veronica Dawson has come to Banshee to take over the serial killer case.

B8457S04E05.description: Proctor takes his anger out on the Amish. Watts has plans to take the Brotherhood in a direction that angers Calvin.

B8457S04E06.description: Maggie makes a bold decision, Hood and Veronica get a big lead, Carrie gets visited by unexpected guests.

B8457S04E07.description: After receiving the voice message from Veronica, Hood and Brock go out looking for her.

B8457S04E08.description: Proctor has to deal with an angry brotherhood, Calvin faces Kurt, while Hood and Veronica come to a big realization.

B1458S01E01.description: As a time capsule is opened, a secret is unearthed, and it puts detective James Cormack on the trail of a murderer from a 1994 case that was never solved.

B1458S01E02.description: After the discovery of Isabel's hair, those involved with the time capsule project from 1994 are at the forefront of Cormack's investigation.

B1458S01E03.description: Something is rotten in the state of Ashford.

B1458S02E01.description: In 2003 Zoe Jacobs disappeared during her 21st birthday party. Many believe Zoe ran away but others suspect she was murdered.

B1458S02E02.description: New evidence gives Nadja and Sam hope that Zoe is still alive. But as Cormack puts together a timeline of Zoe's disappearance.

B1458S02E03.description: Cormack invites Sam to examine the contents of Zoe's backpack and probe her memory for clues. Re-examining CCTV footage from the night she disappeared.

B1458S02E04.description: The truth of what happened to Zoe sends shockwaves through the community.

B1458S02E06.description: Cormack is hot on the heels of Zoe's killer after Julie is thrust into the spotlight.

H6842S01E01.description: Congressman Francis Underwood has been declined the chair for Secretary of State.

H6842S01E02.description: Francis and Doug plan to frame Secretary of State nominee, Michael Kern. Meanwhile,

H6842S01E03.description: Francis heads for his hometown to deal with a crisis. Zoe negotiates the politics of being a journalist on the rise.

H6842S01E04.description: Francis shakes down the Congressional leadership.

H6842S01E05.description: A feud starts between Francis and Marty Spinella. Russo goes into depression about the job losses at the shipyards.

H6842S01E06.description: The strike between Frank and Marty starts to get out of hand. Russo has decided to run for Governor of Pennsylvania.

H6842S01E07.description: Frank helps Peter get ready for his governor race, but Peter is starting to have second thoughts.

H6842S01E08.description: Frank has a library named after him at his old military school and spends time with his old friends.

H6842S01E09.description: Frank tries to do whatever it takes to get the new bill past congress. Russo goes on a bus campaign with the Vice President,

H6842S01E10.description: Told that Claire was behind the watershed bill's failure, Francis works to contain the damage and maintain control over Peter Russo.

H6842S01E11.description: Following the collapse of Russo's campaign, Francis launches a risky ploy to join the Walker administration.

H6842S01E12.description: The President sends Frank to St. Louis to persuade Raymond Tusk into becoming the new Vice President.

H6842S01E13.description: Frank scrambles to keep his plan on track. Gillian is planning to sue Claire.

H6842S02E01.description: Frank prepares for his promotion to Vice President. Doug tries to erase all leads leading back to him and Frank.

H6842S02E02.description: Frank is announced as Vice President. The US meets with China. Jackie faces obstacles as she plans to run for new whip.

H6842S02E03.description: The tension between Francis and Raymond Tusk increases while the situation in China is getting worse.

H6842S02E04.description: A Terror threat traps Francis in the Congress building with a bitter Donald Blythe.

H6842S02E05.description: Francis resorts to informal negotiations with a Chinese billionaire. Lucas takes extreme measures in use to reveal the vice president.

H6842S02E06.description: In the middle of an energy crisis, Francis and Tusk end their fragile alliance. Lucas must make a difficult choice.

H6842S02E07.description: Despite friction, the friendship between the Walkers and the Underwoods becomes stronger. But there's a war between Francis and Tusk.

H6842S02E08.description: The war with Tusk intensified. Claire influences Tricia Walker, both on the political and domestic front.

H6842S02E09.description: It becomes personal when Tusk hits the Underwood pair with a scandal. Freddy and his restaurant will be involved in it all.

H6842S02E10.description: With a military stalemate abroad and a possible violent situation at home, Francis wants to put an end to Tusk forever.

H6842S02E11.description: Frank is questioned by a special prosecutor. Remy Danton is trying to keep all options open.

H6842S02E12.description: Francis feels shut out. Stamper tries to regain control.

H6842S02E13.description: Francis is about to be destroyed while the nation is in turmoil. Stamper must pick up loose ends.

H6842S03E01.description: Frank's approval ratings have plummeted. Doug goes through rehab over his injury.

H6842S03E02.description: Claire's U.N. bid runs into trouble. Frank fights off mutiny with a bold address to the country.

H6842S03E03.description: The Russian president's state visit becomes a cold war of wills.

H6842S03E04.description: Claire bypasses Russia at the U.N. Frank tries to outmaneuver a potential challenger and ends up face to face with a higher power.

H6842S03E05.description: Frank declares war on Congress to jump-start his jobs program. Claire spars with the Russian Ambassador.

H6842S03E06.description: Frank and Claire travel to Moscow to negotiate the return of an imprisoned U.S. citizen.

H6842S03E07.description: The damage is done and the Underwoods must repair it. But deep wounds don't heal fast, and sometimes not at all.

H6842S03E08.description: A hurricane endangers more than just the entire East Coast and Frank must make a difficult choice.

H6842S03E09.description: The Jordan Valley erupts in chaos just as Frank's campaign is picking up steam.

H6842S03E10.description: Frank needs to deal with Petrov one on one, while Claire tries to preserve the peace-keeping mission.

H6842S03E11.description: Things turn ugly when Frank, Jackie, and Heather square off during their first debate.

H6842S03E12.description: Claire is given an even larger role in the campaign. The gain in points drives Heather to look for dirt on Claire.

H6842S03E13.description: Francis and Claire's relationship reaches a critical point. Doug catches up with his past.

H6842S04E01.description: As Claire begins exploring a campaign of her own, she and Frank engage in backdoor political maneuvering.

H6842S04E02.description: As Claire begins exploring a campaign of her own, she and Frank engage in backdoor political maneuvering.

H6842S04E03.description: Claire joins Frank as he campaigns in South Carolina, but he doesn't trust her.

H6842S04E04.description: Claire threatens Frank while Frank makes a politically bold move that may provoke Russia.

H6842S04E05.description: Claire advises the VP Donald Blythe on dealing with Russia.

H6842S04E06.description: Claire clashes with the Secretary of State Durant over her involvement in negotiations with Russia.

H6842S04E07.description: Frank and Claire adjust to their new reality. The search for Frank's running mate begins.

H6842S04E08.description: Formidable as ever, Frank and Claire have their eyes on the big picture as they manipulate a potential running mate and push a gun bill.

H6842S04E09.description: At the convention, Frank and his team publicly push for Secretary of State Durant to be chosen as his running mate.

H6842S04E10.description: As Frank deals with a new threat to his candidacy, Claire has doubts about their plan.

H6842S04E11.description: Frank ups the ante on the war on terror to counter Conway's public criticism of his lack of action.

H6842S04E12.description: Frank asks Conway to help deal with extremists threatening to murder hostages.

H6842S04E13.description: As the hostage situation continues, Claire secretly negotiates with an extremist leader.

H6842S05E01.description: As Congress debates investigating Frank, he and Claire attempt to stoke fear of terrorism.

H6842S05E02.description: Frank and his team work to leverage support in key states by any means necessary.

H6842S05E03.description: The day before the election, Conway holds a 24-hour Skype session with voters.

H6842S05E04.description: With a tight race and low voter turnout on Election Day, things look grim for Frank.

H6842S05E05.description: Nine weeks after Election Day, the Underwoods work to consolidate their power. Leann tries to track down a missing Aidan Macallan.

H6842S05E06.description: In the midst of uncertainty, suspected Russian forces take over an American station in Antarctica.

H6842S05E07.description: When a crisis forces White House personnel to take shelter in a bunker, Commerce Department official Jane Davis negotiates through back channels.

H6842S05E08.description: While Frank attends an elite men's weekend gathering to firm up support, Claire deals with a stranded Russian ship and threats from Petrov.

H6842S05E09.description: Petrov tries to influence affairs in the U.S. Jane discusses her agenda with Claire.

H6842S05E10.description: The Underwoods and their team angle to undermine the revived committee investigating Frank. Hammerschmidt's investigation heats up.

H6842S05E11.description: As the team tries to control the fallout from damaging testimony and leaks.

H6842S05E12.description: Frank attempts to stop Cathy from testifying. With Hammerschmidt sniffing out the truth.

H6842S05E13.description: In the wake of a surprising announcement, everything at the White House is shaken up.

H6842S06E01.description: As the first woman to hold the title of President of the United States, Claire faces increased scrutiny and threats.

H6842S06E02.description: Claire clashes with the Shepherds and Mark Usher, who pressure her to sign the Future Act.

H6842S06E03.description: The Shepherds push Claire on a Supreme Court nomination. Doug works to find a new path for himself.

H6842S06E04.description: As a crisis mounts in Syria, Russian President Viktor Petrov wants to make a deal with Claire.

H6842S06E05.description: Claire allows her enemies to think she's incapacitated as they plot to remove her from office.

H6842S06E06.description: Claire makes staff changes. The Shepherds try to recruit Doug to their side.

H6842S06E07.description: While the Shepherd family attempts to diminish Claire's power, Doug goes off the grid but continues angling to advance his agenda.

H6842S06E08.description: Claire tries to tarnish Frank's legacy. Doug provokes Claire by releasing excerpts from Frank's diary.

T4523S01E01.description: After a murder trial exposes the reach of a West Baltimore drug empire, Det. Jimmy McNulty prods superiors into launching an investigation

T4523S01E02.description: As the new detail comes together, detectives pursue Baltimore's Barksdale drug crew and push for a wiretap, but red tape, clashing egos, and scarce resources complicate the case.

T4523S01E03.description: Under pressure for quick results, Daniels' detail attempts an undercover buy with Bubbles to reach Avon and the Barksdale crew. On the corner, D'Angelo's dealers face a new stick-up threat.

T4523S01E04.description: Daniels' unit reopens old homicide files looking for a path into the Barksdale organization, while McNulty and Bunk work a stubborn cold case. With pressure mounting, Avon and Stringer adjust crew tactics to stay ahead.

T4523S01E05.description: Baltimore's new drug detail scrambles to decipher the Barksdale crew's pager code, testing surveillance and informant work as the organization adapts to stay ahead.

T4523S01E06.description: With the court's approval, Daniels' unit launches its first wiretap and learns how tightly Barksdale's crew communicates. As the targets switch tactics, the detail scrambles to keep up on the street.

T4523S01E07.description: The wiretap finally delivers leads, and Daniels' detail targets its first major arrest - forcing Avon and Stringer to tighten security as pressure mounts on both sides.

T4523S01E08.description: A chance encounter gives McNulty a key lead on Stringer Bell as the detail's money trail runs into political pressure. On the street, Stringer demands discipline while Omar's feud with the Barksdales escalates.

T4523S01E09.description: As the detail traces the Barksdale money trail, Avon and Stringer pour cash and pride into the annual Eastside-Westside basketball showdown, turning a neighborhood game into a test of power.

T4523S01E10.description: Daniels' wiretap detail works to protect a potential witness as bosses demand quick arrests, pushing them toward a risky undercover sting while the Barksdale crew tightens security.

T4523S01E11.description: After an undercover operation goes wrong, Baltimore police launch a citywide manhunt while the wiretap detail comes under intense scrutiny - and the Barksdale crew scrambles to cover its tracks.

T4523S01E12.description: With a cop down, the major crimes detail doubles down on the wire and street work, while a Baltimore drug crew goes into damage control - shifting operations, tightening ranks, and trying to stay ahead of the case.

T4523S01E13.description: As the Major Crimes detail makes its final push against the Barksdale crew, the investigation turns into a courtroom battle that puts reputations, loyalties, and careers on the line.

T4523S02E01.description: A grim discovery at Baltimore's docks steers the police toward a new investigation, exposing the pressure on the port and its union workers as the Major Crimes team adapts to unfamiliar territory.

T4523S02E02.description: Baltimore police investigate a grim discovery in a shipping container, tracing leads to the waterfront as the struggling stevedores' union comes into focus.

T4523S02E03.description: Bunk and Freamon track the container tied to the harbor deaths to Philadelphia as McNulty pushes to identify a Jane Doe. At the docks, Nick and Ziggy try a risky theft, while Daniels weighs his next move.

T4523S02E04.description: Daniels is recruited to run a new docks detail as McNulty digs into the shipping-container case. Meanwhile, Nick and Ziggy chase quick cash on the waterfront, drawing them closer to the port's criminal world.

T4523S02E05.description: As the dock case gains traction, Beadie and Daniels' detail chase a lead on missing cargo, while Ziggy's risky hustle escalates and the Barksdale crew confronts new complications.

T4523S02E06.description: Omar testifies in a Barksdale murder trial as Daniels' detail digs into Frank Sobotka's finances and begins tracking port containers. McNulty tries to step back from the Jane Doe case, while tensions rise on the docks.

T4523S02E07.description: Daniels' detail tightens surveillance on the docks as Greggs and Prez chase leads on a prostitution ring, while Frank Sobotka presses his lobbyist and confronts the port's uncertain future.

T4523S02E08.description: McNulty's legendary binge alarms Bunk, while the port detail secures a wiretap to pursue the smuggling case -- and a taunted Ziggy is pushed toward a showdown at the docks.

T4523S02E09.description: As the dock investigation tightens and the smugglers change tactics, a corner dispute erupts, drawing unwanted heat. McNulty goes undercover in a brothel while Ziggy launches a risky new hustle.

T4523S02E10.description: The Major Crimes Unit closes in on the port smuggling ring, forcing Frank Sobotka into a corner while the elusive masterminds make a risky play to keep their operation intact.

T4523S02E11.description: As the docks smuggling case tightens, the detail races to identify the elusive "Greek" while the union is squeezed from both sides by law enforcement and ruthless partners.

T4523S02E12.description: Closing in on the docks, Daniels' detail tightens the net around a smuggling operation as the stevedores' union faces hard choices -- and the city weighs the case's political cost.

T4523S03E01.description: As the Franklin Terrace towers fall, the Barksdale crew searches for new turf and police pursue fresh leads in West Baltimore's shifting drug trade.

T4523S03E02.description: Omar's robberies put pressure on the Barksdales, Stringer tests Bodie against an emerging rival, and McNulty quietly revisits an unsettling old case.

T4523S03E03.description: Pressure over Baltimore's crime stats rattles police brass as Daniels' detail shifts targets, Omar eyes a Barksdale stash house, and Colvin begins formulating a bold new strategy.

T4523S03E04.description: McNulty and Greggs enlist Bubbles to map the West Side drug trade, as Colvin pursues a risky policing experiment and Carcetti takes a major political step.

T4523S03E05.description: Colvin pressures mid-level dealers as McNulty reassesses the Barksdale investigation and new alliances threaten to alter Baltimore's drug trade.

T4523S03E06.description: Colvin doubles down on his free-zone plan as Stringer Bell gets a costly lesson in real estate and Bunk confronts Omar.

T4523S03E07.description: Colvin's experiment grows more volatile as Major Crimes follows a trail of burner phones and pressure mounts on the Barksdale crew.

T4523S03E08.description: Hamsterdam comes under fire as Stringer's real estate ambitions falter and doubts about D'Angelo's death resurface.

T4523S03E09.description: Hamsterdam faces growing fallout as Major Crimes tightens its burner-phone case and a split-second mistake rattles the detail.

T4523S03E10.description: As Hamsterdam draws scrutiny, Major Crimes pursues a new wiretap while old vendettas resurface.

T4523S03E11.description: Hamsterdam's political fallout grows as Major Crimes edges closer to the Barksdale organization and loyalties begin to shift.

T4523S03E12.description: Avon readies his troops for a seemingly endless war against Marlo. The detail works towards the top rungs of the Barksdale organization with the information garnered from the wire. While Royce continues to grapple with Amsterdam, Burrell offers a deal to minimize the fallout.

T4523S04E01.description: In the Season Four premiere, four boys from West Baltimore play out their summer vacation in the streets. Meanwhile, Marlo has solved the problem that baffled Stringer Bell: how to maintain discipline--read: murders--without getting police attention.

T4523S04E02.description: Herc's soft-duty job with the mayor takes an unexpectedly hard turn. Despite the potential damage to her career, Pearlman provides Freamon and Sydnor with subpoena ammunition for their 'grizzly bear' hunt in City Hall.

T4523S04E03.description: With his lead dwindling, Royce resorts to extreme measures to stall Carcetti's momentum. At Bodie's corner, Michael proves adept as a runner, with Bodie and Marlo taking notice. A re-up bodega is put under surveillance by Omar and Greggs.

T4523S04E04.description: With Freamon and Greggs moved to Homicide, Herc and Dozerman join Marimow in the stripped-down Major Crimes Unit. Cutty gets a 'custodial' job at Tilghman School mopping up truants, but can't make headway in his efforts to mentor Michael.

T4523S04E05.description: The ensuing negative attention turns Royce against Burrell, who takes the heat while Rawls comes to the rescue. At school, Prez's reward/punishment program meets with mixed results, and Colvin looks to restore order by separating disruptive "corner" kids from more attentive "stoop" ones.

T4523S04E06.description: With Election Day approaching, the three mayoral candidates make last-minute appeals. Carcetti wrangles for votes as he responds to a potentially devastating smear. Norris and Greggs get a lead on the Braddock case, but end up being detoured.

T4523S04E07.description: Omar calls in a favor to Bunk. The election over, Royce and Carcetti make peace and contemplate their futures. At school, Prez tricks his students into learning math. Finally, Greggs uses 'soft eyes' at a crime scene.

T4523S04E08.description: To monitor the pulse on the street, Carcetti makes the rounds with members of the force. While Proposition Joe shows off his vocal range, Chris shows Snoop how to expose, and dispose of, New York infiltrators. Colvin uses "corner" logic in class. A newly sober McNulty attends an Irish cop wake.

T4523S04E09.description: Poot returns to the corner after a stint in prison--and is welcomed back. Carcetti engages in a testy budget battle with City Council President Campbell, promotes Daniels, and hits a snag in his efforts to relieve Burrell of his duties.

T4523S04E10.description: Acting on Clay Davis' advice, Burrell seeks to burnish his reputation by ordering the department to double their street arrests. The mandate does not sit well with McNulty, who sets his sights instead on cracking a string of church robberies.

T4523S04E11.description: After flexing his muscles around the city, Carcetti faces his first dilemma when a group of ministers protests Herc's mistreatment of one of their own. Randy gets the cold shoulder at school. Omar and Reynaldo pay a menacing visit to Proposition Joe, with their own proposition.

T4523S04E12.description: On the trail of missing bodies, Freamon turns to a higher authority after being rebuked by Landsman. Carcetti finds his promises of prosperity undermined by the school debt, forcing him to contemplate groveling before the Governor in Annapolis.

T4523S04E13.description: In the Season Four finale, the bodies from the vacants pile up while Burrell offers his support to Daniels and admonishes Rawls for crossing him. A distraught Bubbles finds himself at his wit's end after his revenge plan backfires.

T4523S05E01.description: As McNulty and the detail continue staking out Marlo's crew, recently promoted Sergeant Carver is welcomed by a cauldron of discontent from officers coping with unpaid overtime.

T4523S05E02.description: Although he tells Sydnor the Davis investigation could be a 'career case,' Freamon keeps a wary eye out for Marlo, who takes care of some unfinished business and strikes a business deal with Barksdale.

T4523S05E03.description: Carcetti's master plan for the police department is leaked to the press, sending the brass into a panic. Marlo turns to Proposition Joe to help with an enviable problem.

T4523S05E04.description: Campbell tries to smooth out the transitions in the police department. The newspaper scrambles to confirm surprising news from City Hall, but lose out to the TV media in scooping a high-profile Grand Jury appearance.

T4523S05E05.description: Marlo forges an alliance with a drug connect, who shows him a new communications trick. McNulty's case gets increased attention from the newspaper, in large part thanks to the addition of Templeton to the reporting team.

T4523S05E06.description: Mystified by Omar's disappearance, Marlo and Chris ramp up their efforts to locate their nemesis. After a sparsely attended waterfront ceremony, Carcetti fires away at a larger press event--and recasts himself as a champion for the homeless.

T4523S05E07.description: An unexpected call puts Templeton back in the spotlight--and gets McNulty more attention than he expected.

T4523S05E08.description: Baltimore's renewed police commitment brings fresh recruits to Daniels and McNulty, starting with Carver.

T4523S05E09.description: With Steintorf ordering Rawls to initiate 'creative' remedies for the rising crime rate, Freamon's vigilance pays off with a promising lead.

T4523S05E10.description: Carcetti maps out a damage-control scenario with the police brass in the wake of a startling revelation from Pearlman and Daniels.

T4873S01E01.description: The death of Carmine Falcone and a post-flood crime wave motivates Oz Cobb to fill the power vacuum left in the criminal underworld of Gotham City, while Falcone's children attempt to keep their family together.

T4873S01E02.description: Sofia works to secure her family's strength, while Oz attempts to play both the Falcones and Maronis to his advantage.

T4873S01E03.description: Oz and Sofia must address the skeletons in their closet as they attempt to control the future of Gotham's drug trade, while Victor is torn between his new life and what remains of his old one.

T4873S01E04.description: Confronting the events that turned her into the Hangman - and led to a decade-long fight for survival in Arkham - Sofia makes plans for a more hopeful future.

T4873S01E05.description: With his nascent operation at stake, Oz makes a desperate move to turn the tables. Meanwhile, Sofia strives to build a new legacy for herself.

T4873S01E06.description: Despite his enemies' attempts to smoke him out, Oz seeks to expand his reach in the city. Meanwhile, Victor crosses paths with a former adversary.

T4873S01E07.description: Oz fights to preserve his family and his enterprise, while Sofia makes a shocking discovery.

T4873S01E08.description: Truths are laid bare as Oz Cobb nears the end of his journey and his power struggle with Sofia comes to a head.

B3265S01E01.description: 1715: The Golden Age of Piracy. New Providence is a lawless island, controlled by history's most notorious pirate captains. The most feared: Captain Flint.

B3265S01E02.description: Flint unmasks a thief on his crew. Rackham chases a score over Vane's objection. Silver hides with Max in the brothel. Eleanor faces an impossible choice.

B3265S01E03.description: Flint and Gates seek a partner to hunt the Urca d'Lima. Silver helps Billy with a morale problem. Vane impresses Eleanor by being reasonable. Gates gets a promotion.

B3265S01E04.description: An undertaking by The Walrus crew ends in disaster. Silver warns Flint about Billy. Rackham and Bonny try to regain their livelihood. Eleanor needs help from her father. A figure from Vane's past pays a visit.

B3265S01E05.description: Flint and his crew of the Walrus play a deadly game of naval warfare when they engage Captain Bryson and the Andromache on the open sea to gain precious cargo. Richard forces his daughter's hand about his business when he makes an announcement to the locals.

B3265S01E06.description: The costs of chasing the Andromache continue to mount. Eleanor needs Silver's help. Billy wants Gates to confront Flint. Bonny takes a stand.

B3265S01E07.description: Flint tells Gates the truth. Randall puts Silver in a bind. Eleanor suffers a loss. Max comes to Rackham's aid. Vane enters the fight of his life.

B3265S01E08.description: Silver gives Flint the last details of the schedule with the location of the ship. Eleanor's situation changes when the supply ships get sunk in the bay. Meanwhile with Mutiny rising up aboard the Walrus, Gates makes a vital decision.

B3265S02E01.description: Flint and Silver face judgment before the crew. Vane enjoys his new position on the island. Max confronts Bonny. Eleanor faces a new threat.

B3265S02E02.description: Flint gives "advice" to Dufresne. John Silver works to become indispensable. Eleanor is called upon to remove Vane from power over the fort. Jack becomes envious of Anne and Max's new relationship.

B3265S02E03.description: Flint returns to Nassau to plan the retrieval of the gold. Rackham restores his reputation. Ned Low confronts Vane.

B3265S02E04.description: Seeing Flint's steady rise up the ranks leaves Vane feeling like he may be a real threat to his position, and while Eleanor determines which side to choose, elsewhere, Silver and a friend from the past are finally reunited.

B3265S02E05.description: Miranda tries to save the island; Eleanor opens old wounds; Vane deals with a problem.

B3265S02E06.description: Eleanor negotiates for peace; Rackham learns a lesson the hard way; Flint breaks a promise.

B3265S02E07.description: Max cleans up following a massacre; Flint and Silver receive surprising news from the outside world.

B3265S02E08.description: Flint and Miranda brace for the worst; Eleanor learns Max's secret; Vane makes his move.

B3265S02E09.description: Flint and Miranda deal with their past; Vane claims a massive prize; Eleanor declares war.

B3265S02E10.description: Flint receives aid from an unlikely ally; Vane's crew seeks a change; Silver makes a sacrifice.

B3265S03E01.description: Flint and his crew wage war against the world; Eleanor is offered clemency; Vane takes issue with Rackham's methods; one of Nassau's most notorious individuals returns.

B3265S03E02.description: After declining Captain Hornigold's "pardons", Captain Flint and his crew will test their fate; Vane runs into an old friend; Eleanor and Woodes Rogers continue their journey.

B3265S03E03.description: The conflict between Flint and Silver escalates as starvation and dehydration set in; Woodes and Eleanor arrive to troubling circumstances in Nassau; Blackbeard takes charge of an uncertain situation on the island.

B3265S03E04.description: Change begins to take root in Nassau; on a strange island, Flint, Silver and Billy are unified against a common adversary; Blackbeard and Vane formulate a plan of escape.

B3265S03E05.description: Vane finds a new way forward from Teach; Silver urges Flint to make a move or die; Eleanor and Rogers respond to a new threat.

B3265S03E06.description: Flint and Teach clash over the future of piracy; Rogers makes an arrest; Rackham finds new purpose. Madi comes to Silver's aid.

B3265S03E07.description: Captain Flint and Silver returns to Nassau to finish what they started and a legend is born. With Rackham's fate in the hands of Rogers, his future looks grim. Vane's mission evolves while Eleanor confides in Rogers.

B3265S03E08.description: Rogers is attacked during a prisoner transport; Vane and Bonny race to save Rackham; the Walrus and her crew come under siege.

B3265S03E09.description: Captain Flint prepares for the final battle, while Billy tries to save Captain Vane from being hanged; Max must decide who she can trust; Eleanor Guthrie finds herself in charge of Nassau.

B3265S03E10.description: Hornigold and the British come for the pirates; Rackham and Bonny face impossible odds; Silver demands answers from Flint; Billy crowns a king.

B3265S04E01.description: Flint and Silver lead the fight to reclaim Nassau; Jack and Blackbeard seek vengeance; Eleanor attempts to reconcile herself to her new role.

B3265S04E02.description: Flint submits himself to Billy's authority; Eleanor tries to find a way to save Rogers; Silver is forced to become the leader of the war to reclaim Nassau.

B3265S04E03.description: Max runs afoul of the law. Rogers reckons with his past. Flint and Madi reach an understanding. Long John Silver makes his return.

B3265S04E04.description: The streets of Nassau become embroiled in violent strife; Silver demands answers from Billy; Eleanor tries to help Max; Bonny and Rackham suffer a traumatic experience.

B3265S04E05.description: Silver places Flint's survival in his own hands; Billy sows further dissonance; Eleanor jeopardizes everyone and everything to ensure her victory; Rogers orchestrates a seemingly effective appeal.

B3265S04E06.description: Spain invades Nassau without much resistance; Silver tries to fix relations between the pirates and the former slaves; Flint and Eleanor work together to survive the Spanish invasion.

B3265S04E07.description: Flint urges Silver to exercise more caution; Max shows Jack and Anne how to get upriver; Billy meets a survivor; Rogers discovers the truth.

B3265S04E08.description: Flint and Silver's relationship threatens to collapse during a rescue mission; Max discovers the true cost of freedom; Rackham pursues his target.

B3265S04E09.description: Silver and his crew travel to Skeleton Island in pursuit of Flint; Madi is presented with a proposition; Rogers struggles to hear Eleanor; Billy commits himself to the group.

B3265S04E10.description: Flint launches a final, desperate attack to destroy England's hold on Nassau; Silver makes an irreversible decision; Rackham confronts Rogers; Nassau is forever changed.

G6584S01E01.description: King Robert asks Eddard Stark to leave Winterfell for court, where Lannister power looms. Far north, the Night's Watch finds unsettling signs, while exiled Daenerys Targaryen is promised in marriage.

G6584S01E02.description: Ned and his daughters ride south with the king while Jon and Tyrion head to the Wall; across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys faces a new life among the Dothraki.

G6584S01E03.description: In King's Landing, Ned takes up his new post as Hand of the King while Arya begins sword lessons. At the Wall, Jon earns the nickname "Lord Snow." Across the sea, Daenerys adjusts to life with the Dothraki.

G6584S01E04.description: Tyrion and Jon head to the Wall as the Night's Watch tests its newest recruits. Catelyn makes a risky move against the Lannisters, while Ned grapples with the cost of rule and Daenerys adapts to Dothraki life.

G6584S01E05.description: Ned digs deeper into Jon Arryn's death as Stark-Lannister tensions erupt in King's Landing. Catelyn makes a bold move on the road, Arya begins sword lessons, and Daenerys asserts herself among the Dothraki.

G6584S01E06.description: Ned follows leads on Jon Arryn's death as Robert's council debates a threat across the Narrow Sea; Tyrion stands trial in the Vale, Arya trains with Syrio, Jon adjusts to the Wall, and Viserys presses Daenerys and Drogo for a crown.

G6584S01E07.description: Eddard Stark uncovers a perilous secret in King's Landing and weighs a risky move as rival houses maneuver; King Robert rides out on a hunt, while Daenerys faces a growing crisis in the Dothraki camp.

G6584S01E08.description: Ned's arrest sparks chaos: Sansa is held at court as Arya runs for her life; Robb calls the banners, Jon weighs his vows at the Wall, and Daenerys seeks a healer as Drogo weakens.

G6584S01E09.description: In King's Landing, a crowd gathers at the Great Sept of Baelor as Ned makes a desperate bid to spare his daughters; Robb carries the war to the Lannisters; Daenerys faces a difficult reckoning among the Dothraki.

G6584S01E10.description: As the Seven Kingdoms splinter, the Stark family's fates diverge, Robb rallies the North, Jon must choose between love and duty at the Wall, and Daenerys stakes everything on a bold new future.

G6584S02E01.description: Tyrion arrives at King's Landing to take his father's place as Hand of the King. Stannis Baratheon plans to take the Iron Throne for his own. Robb tries to decide his next move in the war. The Night's Watch arrive at the house of Craster.

G6584S02E02.description: Arya makes friends with Gendry. Tyrion tries to take control of the Small Council. Theon arrives at his home, Pyke, in order to persuade his father into helping Robb with the war. Jon tries to investigate Craster's secret.

G6584S02E03.description: Tyrion tries to see who he can trust in the Small Council. Catelyn visits Renly to try and persuade him to join Robb in the war. Theon must decide if his loyalties lie with his own family or with Robb.

G6584S02E04.description: Lord Baelish arrives at Renly's camp just before he faces off against Stannis. Daenerys and her company are welcomed into the city of Qarth. Arya, Gendry, and Hot Pie find themselves imprisoned at Harrenhal.

G6584S02E05.description: Tyrion investigates a secret weapon that King Joffrey plans to use against Stannis. Meanwhile, as a token for saving his life, Jaqen H'ghar offers to kill three people that Arya chooses.

G6584S02E06.description: Theon seizes control of Winterfell. Jon captures a wildling named Ygritte. The people of King's Landing begin to turn against King Joffrey. Daenerys looks to buy ships to sail for the Seven Kingdoms.

G6584S02E07.description: Bran and Rickon have escaped Winterfell. Theon tries to hunt them down. Daenerys' dragons have been stolen. Jon travels through the wilderness with Ygritte as his prisoner. Sansa has bled and is now ready to have Joffrey's children.

G6584S02E08.description: Stannis is just days from King's Landing. Tyrion prepares for his arrival. Jon and Qhorin are taken prisoner by the wildlings. Catelyn is arrested for releasing Jaime. Arya, Gendry, and Hot Pie plan to escape from Harrenhal.

G6584S02E09.description: Stannis Baratheon's fleet and army arrive at King's Landing and the battle for the city begins. Cersei plans for her and her children's future.

G6584S02E10.description: Joffrey puts Sansa aside for Margaery Tyrell. Robb marries Talisa Maegyr. Jon prepares to meet Mance Rayder. Arya says farewell to Jaqen H'ghar. Daenerys tries to rescue her dragons.

G6584S03E01.description: Jon is brought before Mance Rayder, the King Beyond the Wall, while the Night's Watch survivors retreat south. In King's Landing, Tyrion asks for his reward. Littlefinger offers Sansa a way out.

G6584S03E02.description: Bran and company meet Jojen and Meera Reed. Arya, Gendry, and Hot Pie meet the Brotherhood. Jaime travels through the wilderness with Brienne. Sansa confesses her true feelings about Joffery to Margaery.

G6584S03E03.description: Robb and Catelyn arrive at Riverrun for Lord Hoster Tully's funeral. Tywin names Tyrion the new Master of Coin. Arya says goodbye to Hot Pie. The Night's Watch returns to Craster's. Brienne and Jaime are taken prisoner.

G6584S03E04.description: Jaime mopes over his lost hand. Cersei is growing uncomfortable with the Tyrells. The Night's Watch is growing impatient with Craster. Daenerys buys the Unsullied.

G6584S03E05.description: Robb's army is falling apart. Jaime reveals a story to Brienne that he has never told anyone. Jon breaks his vows. The Hound is granted his freedom. The Lannisters hatch a new plan.

G6584S03E06.description: Jon and the wildlings scale the Wall. The Brotherhood sells Gendry to Melisandre. Robb does what he can to win back the Freys. Tyrion tells Sansa about their engagement.

G6584S03E07.description: Jon and the wildlings travel south of the Wall. Talisa tells Robb that she's pregnant. Arya runs away from the Brotherhood. Daenerys arrives at Yunkai. Jaime leaves Brienne behind at Harrenhal.

G6584S03E08.description: Daenerys tries to persuade the Second Sons to join her against Yunkai. Stannis releases Davos from the dungeons. Sam and Gilly are attacked by a White Walker. Sansa and Tyrion wed.

G6584S03E09.description: Robb and Catelyn arrive at the Twins for the wedding. Jon is put to the test to see where his loyalties truly lie. Bran's group decides to split up. Daenerys plans an invasion of Yunkai.

G6584S03E10.description: Bran and company travel beyond the Wall. Sam returns to Castle Black. Jon says goodbye to Ygritte. Jaime returns to King's Landing. The Night's Watch asks for help from Stannis.

G6584S04E01.description: Tyrion welcomes a guest to King's Landing. At Castle Black, Jon stands trial. Daenerys is pointed to Meereen, the mother of all slave cities. Arya runs into an old enemy.

G6584S04E02.description: Joffrey and Margaery's wedding has come. Tyrion breaks up with Shae. Ramsay tries to prove his worth to his father. Bran and company find a Weirwood tree.

G6584S04E03.description: Tyrion is arrested for murder and awaits trial. Sansa escapes King's Landing. Sam sends Gilly to Mole's Town as the Night's Watch finds itself in a tight spot. Meereen challenges Daenerys.

G6584S04E04.description: Jaime entrusts a task to Brienne. Daenerys frees Meereen. Jon is given permission to lead a group of Night's Watchmen to Craster's Keep. Bran and company are taken hostage.

G6584S04E05.description: Tommen is crowned King of the Seven Kingdoms. Cersei builds her case against Tyrion. Sansa and Lord Baelish arrive at the Eyrie. The Night's Watch attacks Craster's Keep.

G6584S04E06.description: Tyrion's trial has come. Yara and her troops storm the Dreadfort to free Theon. Daenerys meets Hizdar zo Loraq. Stannis makes a deal with the Iron Bank of Braavos.

G6584S04E07.description: Tyrion tries to find a champion. Daenerys sleeps with Daario. The Hound becomes wounded. Jon's advice is ignored at Castle Black. Brienne and Podrick receive a tip on Arya's whereabouts.

G6584S04E08.description: Theon helps Ramsay seize Moat Cailin. The wildlings attack Mole's Town. Sansa comes up with a story to protect Lord Baelish. Daenerys finds out a secret about Jorah Mormont. Oberyn Martell faces Gregor Clegane, the Mountain.

G6584S04E09.description: The battle between the Night's Watch and the wildlings has come.

G6584S04E10.description: Jon makes an important decision. Daenerys experiences new consequences. Brienne and Podrick have an unexpected encounter. Bran achieves a goal, while Tyrion makes an important discovery.

G6584S05E01.description: Cersei and Jaime adjust to a world without Tywin. Tyrion and Varys arrive at Pentos. In Meereen, a new enemy emerges. Jon is caught between two kings.

G6584S05E02.description: Arya arrives in Braavos. Jaime takes on a secret mission. Ellaria Sand seeks revenge for Oberyn's death. Stannis makes Jon a generous offer as the Night's Watch elects a new Lord Commander. Daenerys is faced with a difficult decision.

G6584S05E03.description: Tommen and Margaery wed. Arya has trouble adapting to her new life. Littlefinger reveals his plans to Sansa. Jon gives his first orders as Lord Commander. Tyrion and Varys arrive in Volantis.

G6584S05E04.description: Jorah Mormont sets sail alongside his prisoner, Tyrion. Cersei makes a move against the Tyrells. Jaime and Bronn sneak into Dorne. Ellaria and the Sand Snakes make their plans. Melisandre tempts Jon. The Harpies attack.

G6584S05E05.description: Daenerys arrests the heads of Meereen's great families. Jon makes a difficult decision. Theon is forced to face Sansa. Stannis rides south. Tyrion and Jorah enter the ruins of Old Valyria.

G6584S05E06.description: Arya is put to the test. Tyrion and Jorah are captured by slavers. Loras Tyrell is judged by the Sparrows. Jaime and Bronn face the Sand Snakes. Sansa marries Ramsay Bolton.

G6584S05E07.description: Jon heads east as trouble begins to stir for Sam and Gilly at Castle Black. Sansa asks Theon for help. Tyrion and Jorah are sold as slaves. Cersei savors her triumph over the Tyrells as new plots are developed in the shadows.

G6584S05E08.description: Tyrion advises Daenerys. Sansa forces Theon to tell her a secret. Cersei remains stubborn. Arya meets her first target. Jon and Tormund meet with the wildling elders.

G6584S05E09.description: Jon and the wildlings return to Castle Black. Jaime meets with Doran Martell. Stannis makes a hard choice. Arya runs into Meryn Trant. Daenerys attends the grand reopening of the fighting pits.

G6584S05E10.description: Stannis arrives at Winterfell. Tyrion runs Meereen as Daario and Jorah go after Daenerys. Jaime and Myrcella leave Dorne. Jon sends Sam and Gilly to Oldtown. Arya challenges the Many-Faced God. Cersei confesses her sins.

G6584S06E01.description: The fate of Jon Snow is revealed. Daenerys is brought before Khal Moro. Tyrion gets used to living in Meereen. Ramsay sends his dogs after Theon and Sansa. Ellaria and the Sand Snakes make their move. Cersei mourns for Myrcella.

G6584S06E02.description: Bran trains with the Three-Eyed Raven. Tommen meets with Cersei. Tyrion makes a bold move. Theon leaves while at Pyke new issues arise. Ramsay's brother is born. Davos asks Melisandre for a miracle.

G6584S06E03.description: Daenerys arrives at Vaes Dothrak. Sam and Gilly sail for Horn Hill. Arya trains as No One. Varys finds information on the Sons of the Harpy. Ramsay receives a gift. Tommen meets with the High Sparrow. At Castle Black, a miracle occurs.

G6584S06E04.description: Sansa arrives at Castle Black. Tyrion makes a deal with the slave masters. Jorah and Daario sneak into Vaes Dothrak. Ramsay sends a letter to Jon. Theon arrives at Pyke. Cersei and Olenna Tyrell plot against the High Sparrow.

G6584S06E05.description: Sansa and Jon make plans. Arya is given another chance to prove herself. Jorah confesses a secret to Daenerys. Tyrion meets with a red priestess. Yara finds her rule tested. Bran discovers the origin of the White Walkers.

G6584S06E06.description: Bran and Meera find a new ally. Gilly meets Sam's family. Arya makes a difficult choice. The Lannisters and Tyrells march against the High Sparrow.

G6584S06E07.description: Jon and Sansa gather troops. Jaime arrives at Riverrun. Olenna Tyrell plans to leave King's Landing. Theon and Yara plan a destination. Arya makes plans to leave.

G6584S06E08.description: Brienne arrives at Riverrun. Arya seeks shelter. Jaime meets with Edmure Tully. Cersei challenges the Faith. Sandor Clegane hunts for revenge. Tyrion faces the consequences of earlier decisions.

G6584S06E09.description: Jon and Sansa face Ramsay Bolton on the fields of Winterfell. Daenerys strikes back at her enemies. Theon and Yara arrive in Meereen.

G6584S06E10.description: Cersei and Loras Tyrell stand trial by the gods. Daenerys prepares to set sail for Westeros. Davos confronts Melisandre. Sam and Gilly arrive in the Citadel. Bran discovers a long-kept secret. Lord Frey has an uninvited guest.

G6584S07E01.description: Jon organizes the North's defenses. Cersei tries to even the odds. Daenerys comes home. Arya reminds the Freys "the North remembers." Sam adapts to life in Oldtown. The Night King makes his way south.

G6584S07E02.description: Daenerys receives an unexpected visitor. Jon faces resistance. Tyrion plans the conquest of Westeros. Cersei gathers her allies. Arya has a reunion with old friends. Sam risks his career and life.

G6584S07E03.description: Jon and Daenerys finally meet. Cersei gains a new ally. Sansa receives an unexpected visitor. Sam is confronted for his actions.

G6584S07E04.description: Daenerys takes matters into her own hands. Arya reaches her destination. Jaime and Bronn collect the spoils from the war with the Tyrells.

G6584S07E05.description: Daenerys demands loyalty from the surviving Lannister soldiers; Jon heeds Bran's warning about White Walkers on the move; Cersei vows to vanquish anyone or anything that stands in her way.

G6584S07E06.description: Jon and his team go beyond the wall to capture a wight. Daenerys has to make a tough decision.

G6584S07E07.description: Everyone meets in King's Landing to discuss the fate of the realm. In Winterfell, Sansa confronts Arya. Sam reaches Winterfell, where he learns from Bran a shocking secret about Jon Snow.

G6584S08E01.description: Jon and Daenerys arrive in Winterfell and are met with skepticism. Sam learns about the fate of his family. Cersei gives Euron the reward he aims for. Theon follows his heart.

G6584S08E02.description: Jaime faces judgment and Winterfell prepares for the battle to come.

G6584S08E03.description: The Night King and his army have arrived at Winterfell and the great battle begins.

G6584S08E04.description: The Battle of Winterfell is over and a new chapter for Westeros begins.

G6584S08E05.description: Forces have arrived at King's Landing for the final battle.

G6584S08E06.description: In the aftermath of the devastating attack on King's Landing, Daenerys must face the survivors.
